faqs.question: Which is better among B.E (IT) and B.Tech food technology? Which has more scope and high earning jobs in future?
faqs.answer:
Well, this is a subjective question. Both the fields have their own pros and cons. Information Technology has a wide scope and career opportunities, given the technological advancements and digital revolution that the world is heading towards. If you are passionate and have skills you can get amazing opportunities in abroad as well with lucrative salary. 
Further, Food technology is rather a growing field with increasing demand for the food technologists across the country with rasing concerns around food safety and nutrition in India. So, you need to think about your interest areas and then decide for yourself. Best of luck!

faqs.question: How can I get into College of Food Science and Technology, Bapatla for UG/PG courses? Am I eligible for admission?
faqs.answer:
College of Food Science and Technology, Bapatla has below criteria for taking admissions to it's various courses:
Courses Eligibility
B.E. / B.Tech Candidates should have completed 17 years of age as of 31st December of the year of admission (2023) and an upper age limit of 22 years for all the candidates and 25 years in respect of SC/ST candidates as of 31st December of the year of admission (2023). Irrespective of the subjects taken at the qualifying examination, candidates should appear for Biology, Physics, and Chemistry in APEAPCET-2023.

reviews_list.batch_info: B.Tech. in Food Technology - Batch of 2019
reviews_list.review_title: It offers a good atmosphere for students.

review_content.Placements: Almost 80% of students in our course got placed. The highest salary package offered was 3 LPA. Most food industries visited our campus for placements. A role like an executive in any department in the food industry is offered to the students. The average salary package offered in our course was 2.5 LPA. Almost 100% of students got an internship all across India.
review_content.Infrastructure: The college offers an extraordinary course for the brighter future of any student who completed their higher education. The library in the college provides a wide range of books for the following courses. Hostels are newly built with even more facilities for students accommodation.

reviews_list.batch_info: B.Tech. in Food Technology - Batch of 2020
reviews_list.review_title: Good exposure to various fields of food processing and it's extension courses.

review_content.Placements: 2020 pass-out, 16th batch. Less than 10% of students get placed after graduation with a package of 1.5 lakhs to 2.5 lakhs per annum. Rarely we can see companies recruiting during college placements. More than 60% of students got stipend for summer internship with min of 6000 to 12000.
review_content.Infrastructure: College is still in a developing stage for classroom renovation and labs up-gradation. Equipment and machinery of labs and module are still of old version. No access to Wi-Fi for students. Sports is my key interest in college but there is no ground and courts for playing all sport. Food is good.

reviews_list.batch_info: B.Tech. in Food Technology - Batch of 2021
reviews_list.review_title: This college is better for students but has tough subjects.

review_content.Placements: Mostly 40% of the students got placed in our course. The highest salary offered was Rs. 20,000 per month, and the lowest salary offered varied from Rs. 12,000 per month to Rs. 15,000 per month. Top companies like Kellogg's and Srini Food Park visit the campus for recruitment. Almost 30% of the students got internships from Hyderabad Food Park Companies. Top roles offered are mostly for food requirements.
review_content.Infrastructure: Facilities and infrastructure available for our course are better. There is no Wi-Fi, and labs and classrooms are fine. The library is useful. The quality of the facilities in our hostel is excellent. The quality of food served in the mess is good. Canteen is not available, and we don't have space for a playground.

Indo Global Group of Colleges admissions 2026 are open for various courses. Candidates willing to get admission must visit the official website for complete details.

Here are some additional updates regarding the Indo Global Group of Colleges:

college_info.intro: The flagship courses offered at Indo Global Group of Colleges include their BTech programmes are BTech, BArch, MBA, and MTech programmes at the UG and PG levels respectively. These courses are divided across various specialisations, such as the MBA programme, which offers specialisations in HR, Marketing, Finance, MIS, Operations Management, and Business Analytics. Candidates can check the table below for a list of popular programmes offered at Indo Global Group of Colleges:

faqs.answer: A:    Indo Global Group of Colleges has achieved 92.5% placements for the Class of 2024. The average package offered is yet to be released. However, the highest salary offered during the recent drive was INR 40 LPA.
faqs.question: Does Indo Global Group of Colleges really provide 100% placements with good average salaries?

faqs.answer: A:    As per the official website, the highest package offered during the recent Indo Global Group of Colleges placements stood at INR 40 LPA.
faqs.question: What is the salary package offered at Indo Global Group of Colleges?

faqs.answer: A:    Yes, Indo Global Group of Colleges comes equipped with a dedicated Training & Placement Cell. The placement cell at IGGC not only provides regular guidance and comprehensive skill development that prepares them for their future careers. The placement cell at IGGC has shown a comprehensive track record, with over 8,700 students receiving placements in the academic year of 2024.
faqs.question: Is there a placement cell at IGGC?

faqs.answer: A:    As per the latest report, over 150 recruiters participated during Indo Global Group of Colleges placements 2023 and placed students with handsome packages. The total number of recruiters participated during Indo Global Group of Colleges placements 2023 are tabulated below:ParticularsPlacement Statistics (2023)Total recruiters visited150+

faqs.answer: A:    The cutoff for a course at Indo Global Group of Colleges is dependent upon the merit list generated based on the scores of the course-specific qualifying exam. The cutoff for BArch and M.Tech is calculated based on the marks obtained in the NATA and GATE,  respectively. With a seat intake of 40 for BArch and 54 for MTech.
faqs.question: What is the cutoff for M.Tech and BArch at IGGC?

faqs.answer: A:    The cutoff for a course at Indo Global Group of Colleges is dependent upon the merit list generated based on the scores of the course-specific qualifying exam. According to Shiksha.com, the BTech (CSE) course, Indo Global Group of Colleges, PTU BTech Last Round Closing cutoff (General-All India) was 335 and (General-Home State) was 856 for 2025.
faqs.question: What is the cutoff for BTech (CSE) at IGGC?

faqs.answer: A:    The cost of studying at Indo Global Group of Colleges will depend on various factors, but generally, courses at IGGC have a total tuition fee between INR 1.2 Lacs to INR 5 lakh. Hostel enrollment is another factor, with students having to pay fees of around INR 32,000 per semester. In total, a student at Indo Global Group of Colleges may have to pay between INR 2.48-7.56 Lakhs,  not taking into account any miscellaneous fees.
faqs.question: What is the cost of studying in IGGC?

Candidates should have relevant documents proving their eligibility for verification at the time of admission. Besides, the selection for MBA is merit-based.

reviews_list.batch_info: Bachelor of Business Administration (BBA) - Batch of 2026
reviews_list.review_title: Everything is good, faculty is awesome, academics are good too, but placements disappoint me a lot.

review_content.Placements: The placement of our college is not that good. Sure, companies visit here, but the salary is not that good. It's not even the bare minimum. One of my seniors, who was in the last year, got an internship at a Haryana travel agency, which was a semi-government agency. The pay was around Rs.5,000, but the working hours were less, and it was a good opportunity for experience in the work field. However, the placement needs to become a little better here.
review_content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure of our college is very nice. It's really beautiful and soothing, to be honest, it's so close to nature. We can see the mountains from our college. The college building and campus are full of greenery and are clean 24/7. But, if we talk about hostel food, it does not serve good. Our breakfast and lunch are still bearable, but dinner time is horrible for all the hostelers. There are games and events from time to time. Every year, sports week is conducted by the college.

reviews_list.batch_info: B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering - Batch of 2027
reviews_list.review_title: This college is best for students who want to take admission in architecture. All the best.

review_content.Placements: There are 87 students placed in my course at Indo Global College of Engineering. The highest package of our college goes to 18 LPA but this is off-campus, not on campus. There are so many companies who visit our college for their recruitment like Pisoft and others.
review_content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure of our college is very impressive and gives us good vibes. All department facilities are okay. Hostel facilities are also good. But mostly students have concerns about mess food. In hostel, we have Wi-Fi connection. We have libraries according to their department.

overview_faqs.question: Is IGGC a good college?
overview_faqs.answer: Indo Global Group of Colleges is a good college for BTech, BArch, MBA and M.Tech courses with multiple specialisations available for interested students. These courses have been recognised and accredited by national bodies such as the AICTE, NCTE and CoA. Moreover, IGGC has collaborations with multiple institutions with companies, ensuring that the alumni of Indo Global Group of Colleges are ready when they start their careers.

overview_faqs.question: Is Indo Global Group of Colleges a known college/Institute?
overview_faqs.answer: Indo Global Group of Colleges is a well-known institution for After 1th Diploma, B.Com, B.Ed, UG Diploma, B.Tech, BBA, BCA, B.Sc., B.Arch, MBA/PGDM, M.E./M.Tech courses. These programs are delivered by highly experienced faculty. As per Shiksha verified reviews, Indo Global Group of Colleges has a rating of 3.6 on the basis of reviews by students. Not just this, it has also been rated 3.3 on campuslife, 3.4 on placements, 3.5 on faculty and 3.9 on Infrastructure.

overview_faqs.question: Is IGGC a recognised college?
overview_faqs.answer: Yes, Indo Global Group of Colleges has been recognised and accredited by various national bodies such as the AICTE (All India Council for Technical Education), NCTE (National Council for Teacher Education), and CoA (Council of Architecture). Students of IGGC have a leg up on students from non-accredited institutions as they are ensured to follow national quality standards, equipment and infrastructure.

review_summary.college_name: Indo Global Group of Colleges Reviews on Placements, Faculty & Facilities

individual_reviews.course: Bachelor of Business Administration (BBA) - Batch of 2021
individual_reviews.title: A journey that changed my life.

content.Placements: Placement drive of IGC has been one of the best out there. They guided us through every detail of the interviews and what the company was looking for in their candidates. With constant placement activity in college along with my classmates, we had landed handsome jobs with remarkable companies.
content.Infrastructure: IGC had one of the best infrastructure and surroundings, with clean classrooms and hostel, with 24-hour medical facility. Coming from a different state, I always feel paranoid about my living away from home. But IGC was more like home away from home. I never had such difficulty adjusting to its environment.

individual_reviews.course: Bachelor of Business Administration (BBA) - Batch of 2025
individual_reviews.title: This college is absolutely very amazing, especially in rainy season and also it's interesting.

content.Placements: Recently, I completed my bachelor in business administration. This is all about how business works and how we can start our own business with perfect planning and decision. There are many types of companies that come to our college and select many students in different fields.
content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure of my college (IGGOC) is very calm and beautiful. It is perfect for study and fresh mind. There is greenery everywhere. Every department has a different building. The environment is very beautiful most of the time. In the rainy season, we can see the real beauty of this college.

individual_reviews.course: Bachelor of Business Administration (BBA) - Batch of 2026
individual_reviews.title: Everything is good, faculty is awesome, academics are good too, but placements disappoint me a lot.

content.Placements: The placement of our college is not that good. Sure, companies visit here, but the salary is not that good. It's not even the bare minimum. One of my seniors, who was in the last year, got an internship at a Haryana travel agency, which was a semi-government agency. The pay was around Rs.5,000, but the working hours were less, and it was a good opportunity for experience in the work field. However, the placement needs to become a little better here.
content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure of our college is very nice. It's really beautiful and soothing, to be honest, it's so close to nature. We can see the mountains from our college. The college building and campus are full of greenery and are clean 24/7. But, if we talk about hostel food, it does not serve good. Our breakfast and lunch are still bearable, but dinner time is horrible for all the hostelers. There are games and events from time to time. Every year, sports week is conducted by the college.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering - Batch of 2027
individual_reviews.title: This college is best for students who want to take admission in architecture. All the best.

content.Placements: There are 87 students placed in my course at Indo Global College of Engineering. The highest package of our college goes to 18 LPA but this is off-campus, not on campus. There are so many companies who visit our college for their recruitment like Pisoft and others.
content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure of our college is very impressive and gives us good vibes. All department facilities are okay. Hostel facilities are also good. But mostly students have concerns about mess food. In hostel, we have Wi-Fi connection. We have libraries according to their department.

individual_reviews.course: B.Sc. in Medical Laboratory Sciences (MLS) - Batch of 2024
individual_reviews.title: Really good infrastructure and facilities.

content.Placements: 60% of students were placed in our course. The highest package was above 10 LPA, the lowest package was around 5 to 7 LPA, and the average package was below 10 LPA. A maximum students got internships from my course. Most students got internships in very good companies. I don't know the names of those companies.
content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure of our college was very good. Many facilities in our college as well as a hostel like Wi-Fi available 24/7. The food was also good in the hostel mess. The quality of the hostel was very good, with water facilities. Hot water was provided during the winter.

admission_overview.college_name: Indo Global Group of Colleges Admission 2026: Courses, Eligibility, Selection and Application

admission_overview.title: Indo Global Group of Colleges Admission Overview 2026
admission_overview.description: Indo Global Group of Colleges admissions 2026 are both merit and entrance-based. The college accepts scores of certain qualifying exams for most of the courses. The college accepts scores in GATE and NATA for MTech and BArch courses. Indo Global Group of Colleges offers more than 15 courses at the UG, PG and diploma levels. The college offers courses across various streams such as Engineering, Management, Science, Architecture, etc. Candidates can apply for the preferred course online.

eligibility_selection.title: Indo Global Group of Colleges Eligibility and Selection 2026
eligibility_selection.description: The college offers admission to candidates based on their merit or entrance-exam scores. The college accepts NATA for BArch and GATE score for MTech course. For all other courses, aspirants only need to fulfill the eligibility criteria. The basic eligibility for UG courses is Class 12, whereas graduation is required for PG courses. Below are popular Indo Global Group of Colleges courses along with their eligibility and selection criteria:

courses_table.eligibility: Class 12 from a recognised board with Physics and Mathematics as compulsory subjects along with any one of the following: Chemistry/ Biology/ Computer Science/ Biotechnology
Bachelor's degree of a minimum of 3 years in any discipline from a recognised university
Class 12 with at least 50% aggregate in Physics, Chemistry and Mathematics or, 3 year diploma after Class 10 with at least 50% aggregate with Mathematics as a compulsory subject
Class 12 or its equivalent examination in any stream from a recognised board
Class 12 or its equivalent examination in any stream from a recognised board
BE/ BTech with at least 50% aggregate (45% aggregate for reserved category)
courses_table.selection_criteria: GATE/ Merit (in case of insufficient GATE score)

faqs.answer: Candidates need to complete a minimum of Class 12 to apply for a UG course at Indo Global Group of Colleges. The college has specified minimum aggregate of 50% for a few UG courses. Hence, aspirants with 60% in Class 12 can apply provided they also fulfill the subject requirements for the preferred course. Candidates must also meet the selection criteria for admission to applied course.

admission_process.title: Indo Global Group of Colleges Admission Process 2025

paragraphs: Indo Global Group of Colleges admission processinvolves multiple steps. Candidates wanting to take admission in any of the offered courses can apply online. Below are the steps of the same:-
Candidates can fill out the form on the college website. They have to pay the application fees to submit the form.

Candidates are selected for admission to BArch and MTech based on their NATA and GATE scores. Candidates with insufficient GATE score are selected based on their merit. For all other courses, admission is offered based on merit of Class 12 or Graduation.
Selected candidates need to do the verification of documents and pay theIndo Global Group of Colleges feesto confirm their seat.

faqs.question: Does Indo Global Group of Colleges offer lateral entry to BTech course?
faqs.answer: Yes, Indo Global Group of Colleges offer lateral entry to BTech progrmme. In lateral entry, students get direct admission in the second year of the course. Candidates who have passed a minimum of three or two years Diploma examination from an AICTE approved institutions/ recognised university with at least 45% aggregate (40% aggregate for reserved category) in any branch of Engineering and Technology can apply for BTech (LE).

faqs.question: Which are the BTech specialisations offered at Indo Global Group of Colleges?

faqs.question: How can I get a seat in Indo Global Group of Colleges?
faqs.answer: Indo Global Group of Colleges offers seats to candidates based on their merit or entrance exam scores. The college accepts scores in NATA and GATE for admission to BArch and M.Tech programmes, respectively. For all other courses, selection is based on qualifying exam scores of the candidates. Once the selection process is over, shortlisted aspirants need to confirm their seat by paying the course fee.

faqs.question: Can I join Indo Global Group of Colleges without GATE?
faqs.answer: Candidates applying for M.Tech at Indo Global Group of Colleges require having a valid GATE score. However, it is not mandatory. Candidates with insufficient GATE score are also offered admission in M.Tech based on their merit. In such a case, the selection of the aspirants is based on their inter-se-merit in qualifying examination. Besides, aspirants must also fulfill the eligibility requirements for admission.

faqs.question: For how many courses can a candidate apply through one application form in IGGC?
faqs.answer: A candidate may only join one programme of Indo Global Group of Colleges at a time. This is because, according to theAICTE, A student can only pursueonePhysical/Full-Timecourse at a time. Moreover, IGGC only offers courses in Physical/Full-Time modes with nodistanceoropen-learningmodes available.

faqs.question: What is the cutoff for BTech (CSE) at IGGC?
faqs.answer: The cutoff for a course at Indo Global Group of Colleges is dependent upon the merit list generated based on the scores of the course-specific qualifying exam. According to Shiksha.com, theBTech (CSE)course, Indo Global Group of Colleges, PTU BTech Last Round Closing cutoff (General-All India) was 335 and (General-Home State) was 856 for 2025.

placement_data.title: Indo Global Group of Colleges Placement Overview 2025
paragraphs: The complete placement details for the batch 2025 are yet to be released. As per the offcial website, the highest package offered during the recent placements at Indo Global Group of Colleges stood at INR 40 LPA . Earlier, the institute has achieved 92.5% placements in the academic year 2023-24 . A total of 750 students were eligible for 2024 placement drive, of which 694 students received job offers from reputed companies. In 2023, more than 150 companies visited the campus and placed 723 students form the batch of 800 students. Some of the top recruiters of Indo Global Group of Colleges include Cisco, IBM, Wipro, L&T, Redhat, Oracle, Ashoka Leyland, Simplex, etc.

Every department has a different building. The environment is very beautiful most of the time. In the rainy season, we can see the real beauty of this college.

reviews.review_heading: Everything is good, faculty is awesome, academics are good too, but placements disappoint me a lot.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of our college is very nice. It's really beautiful and soothing, to be honest, it's so close to nature. We can see the mountains from our college. The college building and campus are full of greenery and are clean 24/7. But, if we talk about hostel food, it does not serve good. Our breakfast and lunch are still bearable, but dinner time is horrible for all the hostelers. There are games and events from time to time. Every year, sports week is conducted by the college.

reviews.review_heading: Really good infrastructure and facilities.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of our college was very good. Many facilities in our college as well as a hostel like Wi-Fi available 24/7. The food was also good in the hostel mess. The quality of the hostel was very good, with water facilities. Hot water was provided during the winter.

reviews.review_heading: I don't like this college and don't come here.
reviews.review_text: The college and classrooms are adorable, but the study is good. I am from the Northeast and didn't want to stay in the hostel from the start, but we are required to stay in the hostel for 1 year. Even if we don't stay in the hostel, we have to pay the fee. So, staying in the hostel for a year. There are no interesting extracurricular activities. It's in a deep countryside village, and there are no hospital facilities nearby. There's only one canteen with some limited food items.

reviews.review_heading: Review of Indo Global College of Engineering as a fresher.
reviews.review_text: There are 45 students in each section, and 2 sections are there in my branch. Two teachers are able to handle the students easily. Teachers are very nice, polite, helpful, and supportive. Guards are a bit harsh, but it is their duty. Overall, the experience is very good with faculty as a fresher.

reviews.review_heading: This college is not a good option.
reviews.review_text: Wi-Fi is not working properly in the college. Classrooms are average but very hot in the summer. Do not have many facilities. Very poor transport facility. The college is built in a rural area. It is not very crowded, which is a good point.

reviews.review_heading: Our college has good infrastructure.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of all departments is good. The library has many books related to courses. Labs are available for different courses. We have 3 computer labs. Classrooms are spacious and clean. The food served in the hostel is not much good. The food served in the mess and canteen is below average. Medical facilities are available in our college. Our college provides facilities for sports like basketball, volleyball, cricket, etc.

reviews.review_heading: Our college provides good placements for batch 2023.
reviews.review_text: The college has a fully functioning lab, clean classrooms, Wi-Fi, and a library with lots of books available. The quality of food in hostels is average. There is a huge playground as well as a football ground. The hostel rooms are clean, spacious, and well-maintained. The girl's hostels are good too.

reviews.review_heading: Actually college is good by infrastructure.
reviews.review_text: Good infrastructure. Nice building, looks too good but in sports college is not good they don't even do intercollege tournaments. There is no facilities for students to go to even zonal, district level tournaments. They is no scope in sports in this college.

reviews.review_heading: Review of Indo Global Group of Colleges.
reviews.review_text: The college facilities are not so good. The infrastructure is good. Wi-Fi is available and is working properly. Classrooms are good, and the library is also good.

reviews.review_heading: Review of Indo Global Group of Colleges.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure is basic, with no projectors and AC classrooms. The traditional methodology of blackboards is followed. There are many computer labs with good facilities available for students. It is a Wi-Fi-enabled campus. The library has every book you'll ever need. The hostel infrastructure is good, with 24x7 water and electricity, but the quality of food is average. No hostel availability issues at all, as you will get it. Medical facilities and a good canteen are available. There is no s...

reviews.review_heading: Review of Indo Global Group of Colleges.
reviews.review_text: Indo Global Group of College is situated nearly 17 km away from PGI Chandigarh in a remote village known as Abhipur. The college is situated in a very prime place. The environment is very peaceful and contribute to a healthy environment for students. The college infrastructure is very good and has a very beautiful campus.

reviews.review_heading: It has very good infrastructure and greenery.
reviews.review_text: The college has excellent infrastructure and hostel facilities. But Wi-Fi is poor. The mess food is not bad. The canteen offers almost all food items. There are cricket, football, volleyball, and basketball grounds. A clock tower is available. A cafeteria and a gym are available.

individual_reviews.course: B.E. in Computer Engineering - Batch of 2025
individual_reviews.title: All about the fascinating & knowledge hub of SRTTC!

content.Placements: 70% of students received placements, with the highest package being 12 LPA. The average package is between 6-7 LPA, while the lowest package ranges from 5-6 LPA. Companies such as Wipro, Capgemini, TCS, Amazon, and many others visit the college for recruitment. Most students begin securing internships starting in their second year and continue to participate in internships throughout their studies.
content.Infrastructure: The college offers well-maintained classrooms libraries and labs tailored to different fields of study. We provide top-quality hostel accommodation, home-like meals, and a variety of sports facilities, including a large playing field, basketball court, volleyball court, and gym. Unique games are organized at the college, creating a lively and enjoyable atmosphere. Overall, the environment here is friendly and welcoming.

individual_reviews.course: B.E. in Civil Engineering - Batch of 2022
individual_reviews.title: Dissatisfied with the placements of the 2022 civil batch.

content.Placements: My honest suggestion is to consider other colleges before taking admission; only 80 out of 70 students were placed at L&T and TCS. The average salary is INR 20,000 per month. All of us get an internship in the eighth semester, but only for six months or it is with a low-salary regional company. The top role offered is associate system engineer. Placements need to improve.
content.Infrastructure: Free internet Wi-Fi facilities are only available in libraries; classrooms are decent. The hostel is 2 km from the college, but every morning, the college bus picks up and drops off all hostels at the college. Hostel rooms are big, and the food is good, which is one thing I love. For sports, the campus playground and game courts are present.

reviews.review_heading: Well and good, with good faculty members.
reviews.review_text: Labs are very clean and tidy all the equipments are provided and also classroom is clean and tidy with projector. Library is best every type of book is present and also provided Wi-Fi for reference study from internet. Sports and indoor games is good and also gymnasium is present.

reviews.review_heading: SRTTC is the best and provides a good platform to represent yourself in well-reputed companies.
reviews.review_text: Our college has a beautiful infrastructure. Labs are Wi-Fi enabled. There is a huge library with good reference books. A first-aid box is available. The college conducts different sports and games. Quality of food served in the canteen is good.

reviews.review_heading: Good for education but practical skills should be provided to make a student corporate ready.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of our college is pretty good. There is a Wi-Fi zone on the campus. Hygienic canteen facility is provided. Well-equipped laboratories are available. An advanced digital library is available with all facilities. There are well-designed classrooms with digitised lecture facility. The college environment is good. The entire site is peaceful. Overall, the campus has a good environment for studies. The college also has a good organisation of sports as it has a basketball ground, vo...

reviews.review_heading: A good college within the budget less than Rs. 70,000.
reviews.review_text: The college has very good infrastructure. It has a volleyball ground, basketball ground and also an indoor sports room. The whole campus is Wi-Fi enabled. The college has the best labs for experiments. There are no issues with the infrastructure of our college.

reviews.review_heading: Good infrastructure, and some of the faculty members are always helpful.
reviews.review_text: The college has a very good infrastructure. The campus has a good environment. All the facilities like Wi-Fi, labs related to all subjects, libraries, classrooms, sports ground and other games facilities are available on the campus. Quality of food is good every day. Security is good.

reviews.review_heading: Satisfied with faculty, but dissatisfied with placements. Infrastructure and facilities are great.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of our college is pleasant, and the climate is the best. The crowd is good. Wi-Fi connection, labs, workshops and efficient sports facilities are available in the college. Inter-college competitions are also conducted. Food available in the canteen is good, and the prices are reasonable for students. Labs have good safety precautions.

reviews_list.batch_info: B.Tech. in Artificial Intelligence and Data Science - Batch of 2027
reviews_list.review_title: If there's no other option of colleges, then you can feel free to join this college.

review_content.Placements: The placement in my college is very low, but it is possible to be placed. Since my course (AI&this) started fresh in 2023, and I am the first batch of the course, we can say placements are good enough for good academic students. My seniors were placed in a ratio of 5 in 100.
review_content.Infrastructure: Labs are exciting to attend. Hostel is also good for those who expect an average hostel life. Food used to be great. Library is available till 6 pm. Classrooms need to be altered because I used to see some broken benches in a few classes, and fans don't work, but we complain to the management, and they repaired it ASAP.

reviews_list.review_title: Sea College true review by a student of final year.

review_content.Placements: Placements are good but the packages are very low, around 3-4 LPA, and there are no big companies approaching the college; only some small companies are recruiting. They conduct tests and interviews, but no one seems to be getting selected, and I don't know why.
review_content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure is very good and the hostel is also nice; they recently constructed a new hostel which is decent. The course syllabus is good, but the teachers seem to focus only on money. They appear to be taking advantage of students, charging fines and other fees unnecessarily.

individual_reviews.course: BE - Electronics & Communication Engineering - Batch of 2027
individual_reviews.title: I think it is a budget-friendly college with a good staff.

content.Placements: I joined this college in 2023, and since then, I have been studying here. As per my information, last year only a few students got placed through the college campus selection, and most found jobs by themselves. I think the college is not that good at providing jobs.
content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure of the college is good. They have two parks and a garden area to sit and relax. They also have a big stadium for playing cricket and a canteen. I think the infrastructure is good. I don't know about the hostel because I am a day scholar.

individual_reviews.course: BE - Artificial Intelligence and Machine Learning - Batch of 2028
individual_reviews.title: SEA College Review: Satisfied with the faculty, good infrastructure, and faculty members.

content.Placements: Students scoring above 8 CGPA will get placements. The highest package is around 10 LPA, the average package is around 5 LPA, and the lowest is 2 LPA. The top recruiting companies of our college are Capgemini, Infosys, HP, and TCS. More than 50% of students got internships in the best companies.
content.Infrastructure: The college library is the best, and a digital library is available. Labs and classrooms are well-maintained. The hostel is also good. The girls' hostel building seems quite old, but inside, it’s well-maintained, and the food is also good. They provide non-veg twice a week.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Artificial Intelligence and Data Science - Batch of 2027
individual_reviews.title: If there's no other option of colleges, then you can feel free to join this college.

content.Placements: The placement in my college is very low, but it is possible to be placed. Since my course (AI&this) started fresh in 2023, and I am the first batch of the course, we can say placements are good enough for good academic students. My seniors were placed in a ratio of 5 in 100.
content.Infrastructure: Labs are exciting to attend. Hostel is also good for those who expect an average hostel life. Food used to be great. Library is available till 6 pm. Classrooms need to be altered because I used to see some broken benches in a few classes, and fans don't work, but we complain to the management, and they repaired it ASAP.

individual_reviews.course: B.E. in CSE (IoT and Cyber Security including Block Chain Technology) - Batch of 2025
individual_reviews.title: Sea College true review by a student of final year.

content.Placements: Placements are good but the packages are very low, around 3-4 LPA, and there are no big companies approaching the college; only some small companies are recruiting. They conduct tests and interviews, but no one seems to be getting selected, and I don't know why.
content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure is very good and the hostel is also nice; they recently constructed a new hostel which is decent. The course syllabus is good, but the teachers seem to focus only on money. They appear to be taking advantage of students, charging fines and other fees unnecessarily.

individual_reviews.course: BE - Information Science & Engineering - Batch of 2023
individual_reviews.title: Review of S.E.A College of Engineering & Technology.

content.Placements: In placements, there is no discrimination among the students. They treat everyone equally, and they gave chances for everyone to participate in placement. As various companies start approaching our campus when the academics begin. The minimum salary package that students got placed in will be 3.2 Lacs per annum.
content.Infrastructure: Undoubtedly, it's an environment that teaches a lot of things. Starting from dressing style to life skills, we may be able to learn immense knowledge. Sports tournaments were happening in our college at the zonal level, in which students from various colleges participated.

admission_process.title: S.E.A College of Engineering and Technology Admission Process 2025

paragraphs: S.E.A College of Engineering and Technology admissionis through qualifying exam scores of the candidates. The institute offers courses at UG and PG levels in streams includingEngineering, Business and Management Studies and IT and Software.S.E.A College of Engineering and Technologyadmission is granted based on performance of the aspirants in exams, such asGATE, KCET, and COMEDK UGET. Candidates must register online on the institute’s website. For the offline availability of the application form, students must check with the college admission department.
Candidates have to pay a total tuition fee ofINR 1,16,940 - 7,44,444for UG and PG level. Besides tuition fee, students also need to pay caution deposit, exam fee, hostel fee, etc.
Typically, the duration of the UG level courses is 4 years.

Karnataka PGCET is the accepting exam for MBA/PGDM admission at S.E.A College of Engineering & Technology. In 2025, the last round cutoff for MBA/PGDM admission was 25889 in the General category under the AI quota. In 2024, the cutoff rank for the same course was 22089, while in 2023, it was 22207.

reviews.review_heading: Your insight through my experience.
reviews.review_text: The college infrastructure was good. It was based on an old theme. The facilities available include Wi-Fi, drinking water, playgrounds and hostel along with traveling facilities for the students. There are digital classes and labs in the college.

reviews.review_heading: The basic information about SEA college of engineering and technology.
reviews.review_text: The college infrastructure is average and not modern infrastructure. With poor progress towards the development of the property and the environment present, there is no digital learning and not even basic modern-day facilities towards education are available.

reviews.review_heading: S.E.A College of Engineering and Technology.
reviews.review_text: We enjoy a healthy lifestyle at SEA College of Engineering and Technology. Cultural events frequently occur on campus, and we continuously learn new things, which helps in personality development. The overall quality of food available in our canteen is very good.

reviews.review_heading: College is good because of its placement opportunities and campus.
reviews.review_text: Labs have high-end computers for programming and the best instruments for practical sessions. Classrooms are spacious with ICT facilities; the library of the college is large and has more than 5000 books and 2000+ titles. The hostel is first-class, with a variety of food items being provided. Multiple sports facilities are present in the college.

reviews.review_heading: Best college for engineering, happy with the campus life.
reviews.review_text: College is vast and has multiple sports facilities, Wi-Fi for the purpose of studies. The food in mess and canteen is of good taste and quality. Classrooms have ICT and good space. Hostel is separate for boys and girls, international students are placed in separate hostels. It has medical facilities along with 24 hours security. Hostel rooms are top quality and spacious.

reviews.review_heading: Good college and Big Classroom.
reviews.review_text: Infrastructure is good and course is also good. Facilities of our CSE department is Wi-Fi in Labs and big Av hall for Class, The quality of the Facilities in our Hostel such as Cot, Caboard, Hot water and Electricity anytime. Food is good at mess and Canteen. Sports are Conducted in April.

reviews.review_heading: Infrastructure is good at college but the placements is not good.
reviews.review_text: Infrastructure is very good at our college and the college is surrounded by green trees which gives the fresh air. Facility is also good in our College, bus facility is also available for who are coming from outside. Hostel is also quite good and the fee of hostel is high .

reviews.review_heading: The college has good infrastructure and friendly teachers.
reviews.review_text: Facilities like AC computer labs, AC library hall, good and big classrooms, and the best quality and friendly teachers. The college hostels are not bad. It has good rooms and a better study space. But the food quality is average. We have good and strict wardens.

reviews.review_heading: Our college has a good infrastructure, but it is not so good at curriculum.
reviews.review_text: There's a lot of space around the college, and it's like a college in the garden. There is a football court, a cricket ground, and a basketball court. Many other facilities like gym, badminton, shooting, etc., are also available on the campus. The hostel is just 10 MS from the classrooms.

reviews.review_heading: I would not recommend students to take admission in it.
reviews.review_text: I am a day scholar, so I do not know about the hostel facility. According to friends, the hostel is bed quality and food is average. There are no medical facilities, sports are average. The canteen is closed for 2 years, according to friends mess food is not good, and the hostel doesn't hold up to the mark.

admission_process.title: Vinayaka Mission's Kirupananda Variyar Engineering College Admission Process 2025

paragraphs: Vinayaka Mission's Kirupananda Variyar Engineering College, Vinayaka Mission's Research Foundation,offers admission to candidates in 3 programmes. The admission process for the same is held online. Students have to register themselves with the college by completing the application form, and then sitting for the counselling process.Refer to the pointers below to know theVMKVEC admission process:-
1.VMKVEC Registration Process 2025

The admission process ofVinayaka Mission's Kirupananda Variyar Engineering College, Vinayaka Mission's Research Foundation, begins with the registration of the candidates. This is done by filling out the application forms available online on the official website of the college.
2.VMKVEC Selection Criteria 2025

After successfully registering with the institute, the candidates are required to appear for an entrance exam if they haven't before. The entrance exams accepted by VMKVEC include JEE Mains, GATE, CAT, etc. Candidates must score the required aggregate and appear for the VMRF counselling process to take admission.
3. Admission call and confirmation of seat

Once the exams have been conducted, results are declared and the counselling process is completed, candidates are selected based on the exam scores and merit in the counselling process. If they clear all the criteria, they are selected and informed about the same. However, to confirm the seat, candidates must pay the tuition fee or a certain amount.

Vinayaka Mission's Kirupananda Variyar Engineering College, Vinayaka Mission's Research Foundationfeeshas several components, like tuition fees, hostel fees, mess charges and other charges. The course fee varies with different courses and course levels. The college offers a large no. of seats for a wide range of courses. Candidates who qualify the selection process must pay the tuition fees to confirm their seat. reviews.review_heading: It is very good to join.
reviews.review_text: In this college hostel on my side it's okay to eat food and here we have pure drinking water in cooling heat and normal. This hostel has 24 hour Wi-Fi and medical facilities. It has ragging free campus and the hostel also.

reviews.review_heading: Overall average experience.
reviews.review_text: Wi-Fi, labs, classrooms, and the library are good. During my course duration, I accessed the Wi-Fi, and the labs are clean, but in my 1st year, there are no good computer systems at all. There are no concerns. I'm a day scholar, so I don't know about the hostel and hostel facilities, but some of my friends said that hostels are poor in infrastructure, food, rooms, beds, etc.

reviews.review_heading: Review of Aarupadai Veedu Institute of Technology.
reviews.review_text: We have a huge campus surrounded by nature and Wi-Fi with unlimited browsing data throughout the campus.

reviews.review_heading: It provides excellent placements and internships.
reviews.review_text: The food in our mess is average. The facilities and infrastructure are excellent. There is no room without an air-conditioner in our college. In the hostel, students have two western washrooms also. The students have a relatively good canteen. Our physical education teacher gives importance to all sports.

reviews.review_heading: The worst college fit for time passers with high profile and money.
reviews.review_text: The Wi-Fi facility is good. The classrooms are cool, and a library has many volumes related to our subjects. Drinking water is provided but for other purposes no water. Toilets stink a lot.

reviews.review_heading: Dissatisfied with this college because the placement is the worst, and get this for knowledge only.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure on the campus is well-maintained, decorated, and well-furnished. The good quality of food we are getting from the canteen. The infrastructure is good, and the best part is zero tolerance in ragging. We have the high-quality labs and enough equipment. We have a separate sports department, which is active and always consulting tournament.

reviews.review_heading: Absolutely dissatisfied because of the principal, he didn't provide us with more companies.
reviews.review_text:
Wi-Fi is working well inside the college campus, lab facility is superb, classroom facility is good, as well as hi-tech classrooms are also there as per the requirement. 
Our college has a decent library, as well as a digital library. More than enough books are available. Our college has a medical college nearby which is a branch of our college. So our college provides decent medical facilities. Almost all indoors and outdoor game facilities are available. South-Indian, as well as north Indian f...

reviews.review_heading: Completely irrelevant because faculties have no  knowledge and practical skills.
reviews.review_text: If I have to talk about my college infrastructure, then I would like to thanks my university chairman who worked hard and invested a lot in infrastructure. As per me, infrastructure is built enough to satisfy the needs of students in every aspect of student life, and specific places are built.

reviews.review_heading: Vianayak mission university is 100% recognised by all antional bodies like UGC.
reviews.review_text: In biomedical engineering course have many opportunity and have many facilities in our college. Have labs and wife facilities and classrooms and library. And vmkvec has much quality of the facilities in hostel and googg quality of foods available in mess and canteen .

reviews.review_heading: Review of Vinayaka Mission's Kirupananda Variyar Engineering College.
reviews.review_text: Classrooms were well-maintained. Our campus was Wi-Fi enabled 24X7. Laboratories were very good. There was a decent library in this college. In each hostel room, around 5 students could be accommodated easily. The food served in the canteen was average. Medical facilities were very good. Sports were conducted in this college.

reviews.review_heading: Review of Vinayaka Mission's Kirupananda Variyar Engineering College.
reviews.review_text: Laboratory is excellent. Classrooms are well-maintained. The food served in the mess is great. Medical facility is available. There is a hospital on our campus.

reviews.review_heading: Practical knowledge is provided for better learning.
reviews.review_text: Our department classrooms were cleaned everyday. Wi-fi is available in every block of the departments. We have labs, the largest library, hygienic canteen etc. In mess food condition is hygienic and the mess is wellmaintained,  24 hours emergency services. Games will be played daily at evening on a large ground, lot of facilities to play the game with trainers.

reviews.review_heading: There are good faculty members and good infrastructure, but there are no placements.
reviews.review_text: Wi-Fi facility, labs, classrooms and library facilities are available on our campus. The quality of the labs is average, while the quality of classrooms is good. The quality of the food available in the canteen is good for South Indians. Hostel rooms are huge. During my tenure, the construction of the infrastructure of the college is completed.

reviews.review_heading: The worst college I've ever seen.
reviews.review_text: It is very old college and the infrastructure is very old and everything is broken furniture and not good structure not want to study.

reviews.review_heading: Great College With Good Faculty & Facilities.
reviews.review_text: Infrastructure was too good & suitable for students. Labs are modernized with free Wi-Fi all round the campus. Library was also too good for study & all types of books are available there to read. Medical facilities is excellent in case of emergency & there is a Ambulance always ready for the same. Games & other curricular activities are too good here. Great to have this college.

reviews_list.batch_info: B.Tech. in Computer Science - Batch of 2027
reviews_list.review_title: Good infrastructure, supportive faculty, decent placements, but needs stronger industry exposure.

review_content.Placements: Placement percentage is 75%. The highest package is 9.50 LPA. Average package is 4.50 LPA. Top recruiters (CSE) are Infosys, TCS, Wipro, Cognizant, Chegg India, and BYJU's. 70% of students got internships in companies like IBM and Wipro. Top roles offered are software engineer/developer, system engineer, programmer analyst, project engineer, and cloud engineer.
review_content.Infrastructure: Our college has full campus Wi-Fi, modern classrooms, more than 20 labs, 30,000+ books in library, and digital access. It has well-equipped mechanical shops, seminar halls, and 2000-seats auditorium. Separate hostels are available for boys and girls (AC/non-AC), furnished rooms, Wi-Fi, gym, good electricity/water. Mess and canteen food quality is average but hygienic. Canteen is available for variety. We have on-campus clinic, 24X7 ambulance, and tie-ups with nearby hospitals. It has courts (basketball, volleyball, badminton, tennis), gym, and indoor games. There are more than 20 extra buses for transport.

reviews_list.batch_info: B.Tech. in Computer Science - Batch of 2025
reviews_list.review_title: An average engineering college.

review_content.Placements: I am from the B.Tech CSE batch (2022-26) with about 120 students. In our senior batch 72 percent students got placed. The highest package was 12 LPA, the lowest was 3 LPA and the average was 5.5 LPA. Top recruiters included Infosys, TCS, Wipro, Capgemini, Cognizant, Accenture and Tech Mahindra along with a few startups. 65 percent secured internships through campus or off-campus drives in companies like Infosys, Wipro and tech startups focusing on software and web/app development. Common roles offered were software engineer, associate engineer, system analyst, QA engineer, and data analyst.

review_summary.college_name: United Group of Institutions Reviews on Placements, Faculty & Facilities

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Computer Science - Batch of 2026
individual_reviews.title: Good placements, supportive faculty with decent infrastructure, and needs more practical exposure.

content.Placements: UCER Greater Noida (CSE) records 70-80% placements with an average package of 4 LPA to 5 LPA. The highest package reached 56 LPA (Amazon). Top recruiters include TCS, Wipro, Infosys, HCL, Deloitte, and Amazon, offering roles like software developer, data analyst, and QA engineer.
content.Infrastructure: CSE department has Wi-Fi, well-equipped computer labs, smart classrooms, and a central library with digital resources. Hostel facilities are decent with furnished rooms, medical support, sports facilities, and canteen/mess food of average but manageable quality.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Computer Science - Batch of 2027
individual_reviews.title: This college is average and good for students.

content.Placements: I heard that companies like Infosys and Bajaj come and give an average package. Different roles like software engineer, developer, and data analyst depend on the student's skills. I don't have that much knowledge about the package, but the last package was 3 LPA.
content.Infrastructure: This college is great, and it has modern labs, library, and classrooms. Hostel facilities are also average, and medical facilities are available on campus. College has sports and games facilities too, which is great. They have a great ground for every game.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Computer Science - Batch of 2027
individual_reviews.title: Good infrastructure, supportive faculty, decent placements, but needs stronger industry exposure.

content.Placements: Placement percentage is 75%. The highest package is 9.50 LPA. Average package is 4.50 LPA. Top recruiters (CSE) are Infosys, TCS, Wipro, Cognizant, Chegg India, and BYJU's. 70% of students got internships in companies like IBM and Wipro. Top roles offered are software engineer/developer, system engineer, programmer analyst, project engineer, and cloud engineer.
content.Infrastructure: Our college has full campus Wi-Fi, modern classrooms, more than 20 labs, 30,000+ books in library, and digital access. It has well-equipped mechanical shops, seminar halls, and 2000-seats auditorium. Separate hostels are available for boys and girls (AC/non-AC), furnished rooms, Wi-Fi, gym, good electricity/water. Mess and canteen food quality is average but hygienic. Canteen is available for variety. We have on-campus clinic, 24X7 ambulance, and tie-ups with nearby hospitals. It has courts (basketball, volleyball, badminton, tennis), gym, and indoor games. There are more than 20 extra buses for transport.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Computer Science - Batch of 2025
individual_reviews.title: An average engineering college.

content.Placements: I am from the B.Tech CSE batch (2022-26) with about 120 students. In our senior batch 72 percent students got placed. The highest package was 12 LPA, the lowest was 3 LPA and the average was 5.5 LPA. Top recruiters included Infosys, TCS, Wipro, Capgemini, Cognizant, Accenture and Tech Mahindra along with a few startups. 65 percent secured internships through campus or off-campus drives in companies like Infosys, Wipro and tech startups focusing on software and web/app development. Common roles offered were software engineer, associate engineer, system analyst, QA engineer, and data analyst.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Computer Science - Batch of 2026
individual_reviews.title: Review of United College of Engineering and Research.

content.Placements: I am a CSE student, and I guess approximately 60-70% of students got placement in the CS and IT sector. The highest package is 9.5 LPA at Infosys, and the lowest package is 3.25 LPA at HCL Tech. Companies like TCS, Infosys, Accenture, HCL Tech, etc., visit our campus for placements. Roles offered are DSE, SP, and SE at Infosys, etc.
content.Infrastructure: Most of the classrooms in our college consist of AC and projectors, which are used by our professors for the purpose of teaching. Our college consist of one of the biggest libraries in the state. The quality of facilities in hostel is average, and the quality of food is also average. Food is provided on a weekly basis, with different food on different days.

admission_overview.college_name: United Group of Institutions Course Admission 2025: Dates, Eligibility, Application & Selection Criteria

admission_process.title: United Group of Institutions, Greater Noida Admission Process 2025

paragraphs: United Group of Institutions, Greater Noida admission enquiry form 2025is currently open. The college offers UG & PG courses, such as Btech, BCA, MTech etc. Apart from the UG & PG courses, the institutions also offerDPharmacourses. To get admission to the United Group of Institutions, Greater Noida Noida, candidates will be selected based on entrance/merit. The college offers nine courses in various streams such as Engineering, Management, etc. The application process atUnited Group of Institutions, Greater NoidaNoida is conducted online. Read the following article to know more aboutUGI, Greater Noida course admission2025.

Candidates interested in getting into the United Group of Institutions, Greater Noida are required to follow the entrance exam & the United Group of Institutions, Greater Noida application process. The college is affiliated withAKTU/Guru Gobind Singh Indraprastha University. Check out the below table for details onUnited Group of Institutions, Greater Noida course admissionwhich is inclusive of its eligibility & selection:
Download:UGI, Greater Noida Brochure
STEP 1: United Group of Institutions, Greater Noida Application Process 2025

Candidates are required to apply online on the official website of the institute. The application fee for various courses is INR 1,000. However, candidates can also check detailedUEI, Greater Noida feedetails here.
STEP 2: Selection Rounds
Students will be selected based on entrance exam scores as per respective courses.
STEP 3: Merit List & Admission Confirmation
Once selection rounds are over, the institute releases a merit list. To allot & confirm the seat candidates are required to pay the application fee at the admission receipt centre.

Besides, aspirants with a valid bachelor's degree passed with at least 50% aggregate (45% for SC/ ST candidates) can apply for admission. faqs.question: Is JEE required for B.Tech at United Group of Institutions, Greater Noida?
faqs.answer: Yes, JEE Main scores are accepted for admission to B.Tech programs at United Group of Institutions, Greater Noida. The institution also accepts UPSEE exam scores for admission to its B.Tech programs. Candidates must have passed 10+2 with physics, mathematics, and chemistry/biotechnology or any other relevant subjects. faqs.question: What are the government job options after completing MBA from UGI Greater Noida?
faqs.answer: The United Group of Institutions, Greater Noida, offers MBA graduates good job opportunities in the government sector. For selection, the candidates have to go through the job posting department's selection criteria. There are various government exams as well, through which jobs can be obtained. Some of the popular MBA career opportunities in the government sector for degree holders are: Economist through the Indian Economic Service (IES) Examination Reserve Bank of India Grade B Officer Staff Selection Commission Officer Probationary Officer for Government Banks, etc. NOTE: The aforementioned data is as per the various sources. It is still subject to change.

faqs.question: What are the government job options after BBA from UGI Greater Noida?
faqs.answer: There are job opportunities for BBA degree holders in the government sector. Hence, the United Group of Institutions, Greater Noida BBA graduates can apply for jobs in government departments and organisations. In these job roles, the selection is done on the basis of candidates skill set and performance in the respective selection rounds. A few avenues for government jobs that BBA graduates can explore are as follows: Banking Sector Insurance Sector Staff Selection Commission (SSC) Union Public Service Commission (UPSC) State Public Service Commissions (PSC)

reviews_list.review_title: Decent college, helpful teachers, average placements, and peaceful campus life.

review_content.Placements: Around half of the students got jobs. The highest salary is around 10 LPA- 12 LPA. Most students got about 3 LPA-4 LPA, and the lowest is nearly 2 LPA. Many big companies like TCS, Infosys, Wipro, Tech Mahindra, and some small startups come to hire. About 30-40 percent of students got internships in TCS, Infosys, and other companies. Most of them are doing jobs like Software Developer or Data Analyst. Some students didn't get a good offer, and not many got a higher package.
review_content.Infrastructure: Our department has many things like Wi-Fi, lab rooms, classrooms, and a library. The labs have computers, but some did not work properly. Classrooms have smart boards, but sometimes they stop working in the middle. The library has many books, but the space is limited and chairs are vintage. The hostel is fine, the rooms are not too big but okay. Sometimes it tastes nice, other times not so good. The canteen is giving snacks and cold drink. Medical help is there, but the doctor is not coming regularly.

courses_data.description: Graphic Era Hill University, Haldwani offers MBA for two-years in full-time mode at the PG level. The university offers MBA in General and Agribusiness. Admission to the MBA programme is based on scores of the candidates in aptitude test followed by a personal interview round. Candidates who have completed graduation can apply for the MBA course.

faqs.question: What is the eligibility for MBA at Graphic Era Hill University, Haldwani?
faqs.answer: Candidates must have completed a bachelor's degree in any discipline with a minimum of 65% aggregate to apply for MBA programme at Graphic Era Hill University, Haldwani. Aspirants must also have the documents proving their eligibility for verification at the time of admission.

faqs.question: Can I get admission in MBA at Graphic Era Hill University, Haldwani without entrance exam?
faqs.answer: Graphic Era Hill University, Haldwani considers scores in CAT, MAT, XAT, etc. for admission to MBA. Aspirants need to contact the admission office for admission without entrance exam in the MBA programme. The final selection is done considering aptitude test scores, introduction video and eligibility of the candidates.

faqs.question: How can I get admission at Graphic Era Hill University, Haldwani?
faqs.answer: Graphic Era Hill University, Haldwani offers admission to most of the courses based on merit. Candidates can get admission in MDes and MBA programmes based on scores in any of the accepted entrance exams. The university conducts GECET for admission and scholarship. Aspirants can also get admission via GECET scores.

faqs.question: Can I get direct admission at Graphic Era Hill University, Haldwani?
faqs.answer: Graphic Era Hill University, Haldwani offers admission to candidates based on their merit or entrance exam scores. The requirement of entrance exam is course-specific. Admission to most of the programmes is merit-based. Aspirans can also get admission via GECET scores in the preferred programme.

faqs.question: What is the application process for Graphic Era Hill University, Haldwani admissions?
faqs.answer: The application process for Graphic Era Hill University, Haldwani admissions is as shown here:Open the university admission portal (apply.gehu.ac.in).Register or Login before verifying an account.Select preferences for Campus, Course, Specialisation, etc.Fill applications forms and upload documents (register for GECET if required)Pay application fees (INR 1500) and submit.

faqs.question: What is the eligibility for MBA at Graphic Era Hill University, Haldwani?
faqs.answer: To study MBA at Graphic Era Hill University, Haldwani campus students must complete the course eligibility of:Graduating from a recognised universityWith a minimum score of 65% aggregateStudents must also pay application fees and go through the required selection process.

reviews.review_heading: Educated Bharat hit Bharat short headline is it is a good college.
reviews.review_text: Wi-Fi will get to 20 meters, and labs are equipped. In classrooms, all the seats are good, and the library is filled with books, and sports and games are available, like badminton, football, cricket, volleyball, and many more. The canteen is also good, and the medical facilities are provided by the university also.

reviews.review_heading: My college have very good placement.
reviews.review_text: My course is BCA, and the course is very good for computer education. The hostel service is also good in my university, and food of good quality is available. The course I opted for is a very good course for commerce background students.

reviews.review_heading: Decent college, helpful teachers, average placements, and peaceful campus life.
reviews.review_text: Our department has many things like Wi-Fi, lab rooms, classrooms, and a library. The labs have computers, but some did not work properly. Classrooms have smart boards, but sometimes they stop working in the middle. The library has many books, but the space is limited and chairs are vintage. The hostel is fine, the rooms are not too big but okay. Sometimes it tastes nice, other times not so good. The canteen is giving snacks and cold drink. Medical help is there, but the doctor is not coming regu...

reviews.review_heading: Best college, best faculty.
reviews.review_text:
Best infrastructure, including labs, classrooms and library, and canteens, food is also good and hygienic, but we don't have a hostel on our campus. 
Faculty and everything are the best in our college. The campus is in the best location. Wi-Fi works very well. The library is also the best.

reviews.review_heading: Faculty is good and very knowledgeable. They support us for exams and placements.
reviews.review_text: The Wi-Fi, maps, classrooms, and libraries are very good according to the students because many students learn from the library and labs. There are many computers to do practical work. Facilities in the winner hostel are very good, and the food is really good according to the students. Medical facilities are good. Sports are encouraged. There are many tournaments for PUBG, Free Fire, and many more games.

reviews.review_heading: Overall, Graphic Era is a good choice for students to get placements.
reviews.review_text: Our college includes high-tech computer labs with advanced computer systems, a big library with 1000+ types of books, a well-furnished air-conditioned lecture theater, advanced sports facilities, and physics labs. Chemistry labs and a well-designed media and mass communication room for BJAMC students.

reviews.review_heading: I don't say absolutely satisfied, but it's quite good and good to choose BCA.
reviews.review_text: Wi-Fi facility is good, its speed is also good, and labs are not that big, so all students can't access lab at the same time. Library is good, there are very large variety of books available. Sports are also conducted in large numbers. It has nice computer rooms.

reviews.review_heading: I like the college infrastructure and environment. I am quite happy with it.
reviews.review_text: The college infrastructure and environment are very good and comfortable. After some time, it feels like another home to me. The hostel facilities are currently not available. The quality of food in the college is like homemade food, prepared with home-friendly and student-friendly dishes.

reviews.review_heading: Beautiful campus and excellent teachers.
reviews.review_text: Infrastructure of the college is good, with accessible Wi-Fi connectivity. Well-equipped classrooms, hygienic mess food with a lot of variety, wide promotion in various fields, and satisfactory medical facilities

reviews.review_heading: Review of Graphic Era Hill University Haldwani, in BBA.
reviews.review_text: Infrastructure is good. The toilets and classrooms are very clean. College has limited area but it is well-developed and properly managed by the college department, but sometimes space of the college is an issue because of a large population of college students.

reviews.review_heading: Partially satisfied with placements.
reviews.review_text: The Wi-Fi, labs, classrooms, and library are well-maintained and feature good infrastructure, including a reliable Wi-Fi connection, proper ventilation, and adequate lighting. The quality of the hostels is also very good, just like the college infrastructure. The mess quality is good, but the canteen quality is very high. The medical facilities are top-notch, complete with an ambulance. Sports events occur regularly, and students can play freely during their spare time.

reviews.review_heading: It provides excellent facilities.
reviews.review_text: Wi-Fi, Library, computer labs, and Mac labs are facilities and infrastructure available in MBA, BCA, MCA, and B.Tech courses. The cafeteria facility is also available in the college. The quality of the food is good. A medical room is also available in the college. It has sports facilities like football, basketball and cricket.

reviews.review_heading: Review of GEHU, Haldwani campus.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure on the college campus in Graphic Era Haldwani barely meets college standards. It is a very small campus with space for small classes, a small canteen, 2-3 computer labs, and barely any playground, so there are not many sporting activities in the college.

reviews.review_heading: I chose this course to enhance my soft and hard skills.
reviews.review_text: Wi-Fi, library, computer labs, and MAC labs are facilities and infrastructure available in MBA, BCA, MCA, and B.Tech. Cafeteria facility is also available in the college, and the quality of the food is good. A medical room is also available in the college. Sports include football, basketball, and cricket.

reviews.review_heading: Graphic is the best college.
reviews.review_text: Wi-Fi, library, computer labs, and Mac labs are the facilities and infrastructure available in MBA, BCA, and MCA. A cafeteria facility is also available in the college and the quality of the food is good. A medical room is also available in the college. Sports include football, basketball, and cricket.

fees_and_eligibility.overview: Delhi Skill and Entrepreneurship University - Okhla II Campus offers diverse programmes at UG and PG levels in Full Time mode. The offered programmes can be chosen from streams such as Engineering and IT & Software. At the UG level, candidates have the provision to opt from courses such as B.E. / B.Tech and UG Diploma. Whereas, at PG level, Delhi Skill and Entrepreneurship University - Okhla II Campus offers courses such as M.E./M.Tech. Delhi Skill and Entrepreneurship University - Okhla II Campus fee structure for all the courses is around INR 31,050 to 5,84,750.

faqs.answer: A:    Yes, definitely, you can get into the college with 50% and 55% in 10th and 12th, respectively. However, candidates need to crack JEE Main exam to be eligible for the admission at DSEU. There is no percentage criteria proposed by the authorities to appear in JEE Main but candidates should suppose to attain passing marks in 12th to appear in JEE Main. Candidates can further check out the JEE Main eligibility criteria mentioned below:Candidates can check here the detailed eligibility criteria for JEE Main 2025 prescribed by the NTA for appearing in the exam. All candidates must ensure their eligibility before applying for the exam failing which their candidature will be cancelled.Candidates must have passed class 12 in 2023,  2024 or appearing in 2025.There is no minimum percentage required to appear in JEE Main however, candidates must secure a minimum of 75% marks in class 12 or get admission in IITs, NITs or IIITs. Candidates must have Mathematics as a compulsory subject in class 12.There is no age limit to apply for JEE Main
faqs.question: Can I get into DSEU if I have scored just 50% in 10th and 55% in 12th?

faqs.answer: A:    DSEU offers BTech courses through JEE Main exam. The DSEU JEE Main cutoff 2024 has been released for the affiliated colleges under various All India and Home State qutoas. Considering the JEE Main cutoff data, the minimum rank was published for CSE for Guru Nanak Dev DSEU - Rohini Campus under General AI category. The closing rank for CSE stood at 31128. Similarly, for the OBC category, it stood at 54547. Further, candidates can check out the table below for CSE cutoffs based on different All India categories:CollegeGeneralOBCSCSTPWD Guru Nanak Dev DSEU - Rohini Campus311285454716352337833742015

faqs.answer: A:    Delhi Skill and Entrepreneurship University - Okhla II Campus has below criteria for taking admissions to it's various courses: CoursesEligibilityM.E./M.TechCandidate must have completed B.Tech./ B.E. in relevant discipline or equivalent from a recognised university.B.E. / B.TechCandidate must have completed graduation mentioned mark or more marks in an aggregate of Physics, Chemistry and Mathematics, and has passed English as a subject of study at the senior school certificate examination level.After 10th DiplomaCandidate must have passed 10th examination from a recognised board.UG DiplomaCandidate must have completed 10+2 from any recognised Board/Council.
faqs.question: How can I get into Delhi Skill and Entrepreneurship University - Okhla II Campus for UG/PG courses? Am I eligible for admission?

faqs.answer: A:    Delhi Skill and Entrepreneurship University - Okhla II Campus offers Degree and Diploma courses including 3 UG and 1 PG courses. Additionally, it also has After 10th Diploma courses. These programs are offerred in Full Time mode. Delhi Skill and Entrepreneurship University - Okhla II Campus has specializations such as M.E./M.Tech specializations in Tool Engineering, B.Tech specializations in Mechanical Engineering, Mechatronics Engineering, After 10th Diploma specializations in Mechanical Engineering, UG Diploma specializations in Mechanical Engineering.

reviews_list.batch_info: B.Tech. in Mechanical Engineering - Batch of 2025
reviews_list.review_title: Our college has a good campus and good faculty members.

review_content.Placements: The management says 100% of students got placements in core companies like Maruti Suzuki. It was the highest recruiter in the previous placement drive. The highest salary package is 32 LPA, the lowest is 3 LPA–4 LPA, and the average is 8 LPA–10 LPA.
review_content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure is not that good, but it is fine. The campus is small. There are all facilities, like a library, labs, Wi-Fi, and a small canteen. There is no hostel. There is no medical room. There are some basic medical facilities.

reviews_list.batch_info: B.Tech. in Mechanical Engineering - Batch of 2025
reviews_list.review_title: Dissatisfied with the infrastructure, amazing curriculum and academics.

review_content.Placements: 100% placement record is there. Average package is INR 6-7 LPA and the highest package went upto INR 10 LPA. Companies such as Maruti Suzuki, Motherson group, Bajaj, Mahindra, Wipro, Yokohama visited the college. Companies like Allenberry and Bajaj have taken more than 200 students from different campus.
review_content.Infrastructure: Classrooms are cleaned regularly and are well maintained and have projectors. Wi-fi is also available for students. In library, one may find all the books mentioned in the course. No hostel facility is there. Campus has a volleyball court, table tennis, and chess.
