review_summary.college_name: Delhi Skill and Entrepreneurship University Reviews on Placements, Faculty & Facilities

individual_reviews.course: Diploma in Mechanical Engineering - Batch of 2027
individual_reviews.title: Everything is very good in condition like faculty members, infrastructure, etc.

content.Placements: Hi, I’m Lakshya Sati, a student at GB Pant DSEU Okhla Campus, pursuing a diploma in Mechanical Engineering. I believe that students with over 70% in their 10th standard can apply for this course. While I can't specify the highest or lowest salary packages, the overall placement opportunities are very good. Some of the top recruiting companies include Maruti, Hitachi, Blue Star, and many more.
content.Infrastructure: This campus is overall very good in conditions like study, faculty members, infrastructure, and many more things. No bad feedback for this campus because it deserves this very good quality college personality. As I have told you above. Everything is good in quality.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Mechatronics Engineering - Batch of 2027
individual_reviews.title: It's a new college and it's still improving. In the coming time, it's gonna become a lot better!

content.Placements: The placements are average, with almost 80-90% of students getting placed. But most of the companies are mass recruiters and don't offer big packages. It's still a good start though, and if you're really good, you can even land higher packages. One of our seniors actually got a 24 LPA offer, but they rejected it and ended up getting an even higher one.
content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure is really bad, especially when it comes to sports. The campus is quite small with just two buildings—one for Diploma students and the other for B.Tech. Although all the classes are there, there's very little space for sports. However, we do have a sports meet every year in different campuses.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Mechanical Engineering - Batch of 2025
individual_reviews.title: Our college has a good campus and good faculty members.

content.Placements: The management says 100% of students got placements in core companies like Maruti Suzuki. It was the highest recruiter in the previous placement drive. The highest salary package is 32 LPA, the lowest is 3 LPA–4 LPA, and the average is 8 LPA–10 LPA.
content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure is not that good, but it is fine. The campus is small. There are all facilities, like a library, labs, Wi-Fi, and a small canteen. There is no hostel. There is no medical room. There are some basic medical facilities.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Mechanical Engineering - Batch of 2025
individual_reviews.title: Dissatisfied with the infrastructure, amazing curriculum and academics.

content.Placements: 100% placement record is there. Average package is INR 6-7 LPA and the highest package went upto INR 10 LPA. Companies such as Maruti Suzuki, Motherson group, Bajaj, Mahindra, Wipro, Yokohama visited the college. Companies like Allenberry and Bajaj have taken more than 200 students from different campus.
content.Infrastructure: Classrooms are cleaned regularly and are well maintained and have projectors. Wi-fi is also available for students. In library, one may find all the books mentioned in the course. No hostel facility is there. Campus has a volleyball court, table tennis, and chess.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Mechanical Engineering - Batch of 2025
individual_reviews.title: Placements can be improved and our university regularly conducts workshops.

content.Placements: Our college has excellent placements. In our college, many students are placed. Top recruiting companies like IBM, Tata, etc., visit our campus. In the previous year, the salary package offered was 10 LPA.
content.Infrastructure: Our college has excellent infrastructure. All classrooms have smart boards and good benches. We have a huge cafeteria and classrooms. Wi-Fi is available throughout the campus. The library is good. Our playground is not huge. Parking facilities are available.
content.Faculty: Our teachers are excellent, helpful, and supportive. They are qualified and knowledgeable. DSEU is a new university. It provides practical courses and the best curriculum, in which we get additional knowledge about photography, dance, and drama. Semester exams are easy. The pass percentage is 45%.

hostel_campus.college_name: Delhi Skill and Entrepreneurship University Infrastructure Details & Reviews

reviews.review_heading: Everything is very good in condition like faculty members, infrastructure, etc.
reviews.review_text: This campus is overall very good in conditions like study, faculty members, infrastructure, and many more things. No bad feedback for this campus because it deserves this very good quality college personality. As I have told you above. Everything is good in quality.

reviews.review_heading: It's a new college and it's still improving. In the coming time, it's gonna become a lot better!
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure is really bad, especially when it comes to sports. The campus is quite small with just two buildings—one for Diploma students and the other for B.Tech. Although all the classes are there, there's very little space for sports. However, we do have a sports meet every year in different campuses.

reviews.review_heading: Our college has a good campus and good faculty members.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure is not that good, but it is fine. The campus is small. There are all facilities, like a library, labs, Wi-Fi, and a small canteen. There is no hostel. There is no medical room. There are some basic medical facilities.

reviews.review_heading: Dissatisfied with the infrastructure, amazing curriculum and academics.
reviews.review_text: Classrooms are cleaned regularly and are well maintained and have  projectors. Wi-fi is also available for students. In library, one may find all the books mentioned in the course. No hostel facility is there. Campus has a volleyball court, table tennis, and chess.

reviews.review_heading: Placements can be improved and our university regularly conducts workshops.
reviews.review_text: Our college has excellent infrastructure. All classrooms have smart boards and good benches. We have a huge cafeteria and classrooms. Wi-Fi is available throughout the campus. The library is good. Our playground is not huge. Parking facilities are available.

reviews.review_heading: Our college is very good and the placement service is excellent.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure is good. Buildings are well maintained and painted. There is greenery in our college that makes it so comfortable and makes the study environment in our college. Wi-Fi service is also available for free for students and teaching staff members. Hostels are very good and their arrangement is also good. Mess provides quality and hygienic food to students and teachers. Medical room service was good for emergency cases. Sports room is also available for sports.

reviews.review_heading: Review of Delhi Skill and Entrepreneurship University - Okhla II Campus.
reviews.review_text: There is no hostel on campus. Wi-Fi is available in all classrooms. A projector is available in each classroom. The library is available, and all books are available in the library. A few games are available.

reviews.review_heading: DSEU Okhla Campus 2 was previously called DITE. Excellent college.
reviews.review_text: The college provides overall satisfactory experience. Labs are large enough for 20-30 students to conduct experiments simultaneously. Library is spacious enough to fit 40-50 students at any given time. Labs need a lot of finishing and most importantly, working equipment.

reviews.review_heading: Review of Delhi Skill and Entrepreneurship University - Okhla II Campus.
reviews.review_text: The library is well maintained. Several books, magazines, and weekly newspapers are available. You can also make requests for new books.

reviews.review_heading: Not too good, but it is better than many private colleges.
reviews.review_text: Campus was not too big, all facilities are available like the library, canteen, each classroom has their own projector. Classrooms are well maintained, hostels are not available, you have to rent PG, labs are quite good. Wi-Fi is not available.

reviews.review_heading: Having moderate level in all the aspects: faculty, infrastructure and campus life, etc.
reviews.review_text: No Wi-Fi is provided in the college. Labs are available but the instruments are very old/not working. Classrooms are good, a library is provided but the space is very less. No hostel facility is provided but students can get PG near the college, canteen facility is provided but the quality is moderate. No medical or sports facilities are provided by college.

reviews.review_heading: Average placement for the B.Tech students. Infrastructure is average and it is old but good.
reviews.review_text: Infrastructure is average and it is old but good. The new building is under construction and our college offers update for industry changes according to industry needs and keep the syllabus up to date. They provide webinar from for industry experts to help students.

reviews.review_heading: Good faculty members and average infrastructure.
reviews.review_text: Infrastructure of the college is average. Its neither too big nor too small. Classrooms are good. Labs are there but few equipments are not there due to which we are not able to perform practicals properly. There is no hostel facility provided by the college. Students need to search PG or flats nearby on their own.

reviews.review_heading: Not satisfied with the college. The fees is more fees and less facilities.
reviews.review_text: First of all, there is no hostel, and about other facilities, we do have a library, labs, and classroom but there is really less amount of classroom, around 10 classrooms are there in total. The campus is really small with no official playing ground.

reviews.review_heading: Our campus is developing since I joined this college.
reviews.review_text: Wi-Fi works well but labs don't have good equipment for experiments. Library is good. Hostel is not available. The quality of food served in the canteen is above average. Campus doesn't have proper sports and games facility.

faqs.answer:
A:    Malla Reddy Engineering College And Management Sciences has below criteria for taking admissions to it's various courses: CoursesEligibilityMBA/PGDMCandidate must have passed Bachelor Degree (BA / B.Com/ B.Sc/ BBA / BBM / BCA / BE / B.Tech / B. Pharmacy / Any 3 or 4 year Degree except Oriental Languages). Examinations of minimum three years duration with at least 50% marks (45% marks in case of reserved categories) in the qualifying examinations.
Final year appearing students may also apply on provisional basis.
The minimum age of the candidates should be 19 years as on the date of notification (Candidates whose date of Birth up to 30th MARCH,  2003). faqs.answer: A:    As per different reviews that are available on shiskha, students got recruited by different companies like Life Cell and Zifo RnD. fees_and_eligibility.overview: Crescent School of Life Sciences offers five courses, including BTech, BSc, MTech, MSc and PhD. BTech is a four-year course whereas BSc is of three-year duration. On the other hand, the PG courses, including MTech and MSc are of two-year duration and PhD programme is of two-year duration. Candidates willing to seek admission can go through the Crescent School of Life Science courses and fees in the table below:

faqs.answer: A:    Hi, The official website of Crescent School of Life Sciences does not mention the scores required on the JEE Main exam by a student to get admission. The college only mentions the below infornation as part of the admission process. Students must fulfil the below to get admission to B.Tech course. - A pass in 12th standard exams conducted by State Board/ CBSE/ ISC board or equivalent  with a minimum aggregate of 50%  scores in PCM- Must have given the Crescent Institute Engineering Admission Test (CIEAT 2023) or should have a valid score in JEE (Main)
faqs.question: Can I get into Crescent School of Life Sciences with 70% in JEE Mains?

faqs.answer: A:    Hi, The college only provides entrance-based admission for its BTech and M.Tech courses. Below is the infornation on the accepted exams. - BTech: Must have given the Crescent Institute Engineering Admission Test (CIEAT 2023) or should have a valid score in JEE (Main)- Mtech: Must have a valid score in college conducted CPGEE. Other than this, those with a valid score in National level Entrance examination like GATE, TANCET, etc., are exempted from appearing CPGEE.For BSc and MSc admission, however, students must have a valid score in the last qualifying exam, i.e., Class 12 for BSc and in UG degree for admission to MSc. Having said that, students can talk directly wth the admission office of the college for details on direct admission.
faqs.question: Can I join Crescent School of Life Sciences directly?

faqs.answer: A:    Candidates willing to secure BTech seats at Crescent School of Life Sciences, must have completed twelve years of school education with a minimum 45% from a recognised board. Further, candidates are also resquired to secure a valid score in the Crescent Institute of Science and Technology exam and participate in the counselling rounds as well. The allotment of seats will be done online based on the score in CIEAT 2025 and marks secured in class 12/qualifying exam collectively. However, candidates with a JEE Main score will be offered direct admission in the BTech course.
faqs.question: How secure BTech seats are at Crescent School of Life Sciences?

faqs.answer: A:    Crescent School of Life Sciences offers BTech seats to students who has completed the admission process. To secure BTech seats candidates must complete the entire admission process, including application, selection, admission offer, fee payment, and more. The allotment of seats will be done online based on the score in CIEAT 2025 and marks secured in class 12/qualifying exam collectively. Students with JEE Main score will be offere direct admission.

The highest salary package offered was 4.1 LPA for the course of B.Sc biotechnology. The lowest salary package offered was 2 LPA. Top recruiters here were Life Cell, Zifo RnD, etc. Internships were not provided by our college, except for a few summer training sessions for which they collected the fee from students. Top roles offered by companies through placements were associate analyst and COVID lab technician.

faqs.question: Q: Which is the best course among the courses offered by Crescent School of Life Sciences?

faqs.answer: Yes, pursuing B.Tech at Crescent School of Life Sciences is little expensive. Fee for B.Tech (bachelor of technology) is 2 Lacs per year. So totally you need nearly 8 Lacs to complete this course in this Crescent School of Life Sciences. Actually this fee amount is responsible when compared to other prestigious institutions but return of invest is less. With this same 8 Lacs amount, you can do B.Tech in other prestigious institutions with good return on investment. So B.Tech is expensive here
faqs.question: Q: Is pursuing B.Tech at Crescent School of Life Sciences expensive?

faqs.answer: Actually, there is only one course that is available in this Crescent School of Life Sciences in B.Tech (bachelor of technology). That only available B.Tech course is biotechnology. This course also started recently only in the year 2023. Now, the number of students can take admission into this programme is only 60 members per year. Also return of investment of this course also very less due to less experience in this program. Total fee is 8 Lacs and median salary is 4.5 LPA
faqs.question: Q: How many students can do B.Tech at Crescent School of Life Sciences?

faqs.answer: The highest package for B.Tech students at Crescent School of Life Sciences is 9 Lacs per annum. Actually this is in the year 2022 - 23. Recent placements details not yet updated by the college management. Average salary or Mean Salary is 6 Lacs per annum. By seeing this results we can conclude that this college is good in placements. Also many companies like IDFC First Bank, Intellipaat, FIS Global Business Solutions India Ltd, Kaar Technologies, Innomick Solutions, Vestas, Gariesh Logistics, Shriram Housings Limited, CAFS Jobs, Preludesys, Indus Life Sciences visit the college every year

course_faqs.question: What is the fee for M Tech at Crescent School of Life Sciences?
course_faqs.answer: As per the fee checked around Crescent School of Life Sciences for M.Tech programme, the total tuition fee mentioned on the official website is Rs 2 lakh. But the fee also includes hostel fees and one time fees which is Rs 2.05 lak and Rs 20,000, respectively. Moreover, if the students want to take AC bus service, they are required to pay Rs 40,000-50,000 extra per year.

overview_faqs.question: What are the fees of Crescent School of Life Sciences BSc course?
overview_faqs.answer: Crescent School of Life Sciences BSc course fee is around INR 3 lakh (three years). Candidates can make the fee payment in both online and offline mode. For offline mode, students must pay by cash at B.S.Abdur Rahman Crescent Institute of Science and Technology Campus. Candidates can also opt for Demand Draft or Counter Payment.

overview_faqs.question: Is Crescent School of Life Sciences a good option?
overview_faqs.answer: The pass out and current students of Crescent School of Life Sciences, in their reviews on Shiksha have mentioned the following thngs about life at the college:- Our university organises vivid cultural events and fests every semester to celebrate festivals, talents and many more. - Extracurricular activities like dance, literature, music, sports, drama, Silambam, fashion, etc., are conducted through the official groups. - Our campus had high-speed Wi-Fi available in every corner, with an amazing classroom environment that has both digital and blackboards teaching facilities, it also has average lab facilities now but it is being expanded further, and our college also has a central library where you can find all the books required- Our college conducts symposium and workshops related to the course, which improves our knowledge and makes us experience new skills. As per these quoted statements, it can be considered a good option since most of these present the positive aspects of the col

overview_faqs.question: What is BSc biotechnology in Crescent School of Life Sciences?
overview_faqs.answer: BSc Biotechnology in Crescent School of Life Sciences is an undergraduate course which focuses on the application of Biological principles and processes to technological advancements and innovations. The course lasts for three years and is spread across six semesters. Candidates must have tweleve years of school education with Physics, Chemistry, and Biology (or) Botany / Zoology as the subjects of study and a minimum 50% aggregate for admission to the BSc Biotechnology course.

review_summary.college_name: Crescent School of Life Sciences Reviews on Placements, Faculty & Facilities

individual_reviews.course: M.Sc. in Biotechnology - Batch of 2026
individual_reviews.title: It is an average college.

content.Placements: About 70% of students are placed in top biotechnology and other fields. This course offers research-level jobs, and it is one of the emerging courses in India and other countries. Many students are doing internships by the second semester and are doing well in the field.
content.Infrastructure: The department has seven labs, which are well-equipped for research. Wi-Fi and other facilities are available. The canteen food is average but acceptable. The labs are well-equipped, and the level of instruction is good.

individual_reviews.course: M.Sc. in Biotechnology - Batch of 2026
individual_reviews.title: Okay college. If you are okay with Kurta, you can prefer.

content.Placements: About 50% got placement in different fields. I am not sure about the company names. But help board seeking students to pursue their Ph.D. More offers from reputed companies are taken by the college. I don't know much about the placement as I am a fresher.
content.Infrastructure: There are 7 labs total for Life Science block. There is free Wi-Fi connection. The canteen food is average as a Malayalee student. I am okay with it. Classrooms and libraries are good. As I am far from my house, I prefer college canteen food. There are 4-5 cafes inside the campus for snacks and juice items.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Biotechnology - Batch of 2020
individual_reviews.title: BSA Crescent Institute of Science and Technology review .

content.Placements: Almost more than fifty percent of the students in my batch were placed in different companies. The lowest package offered was 2 LPA, and the highest package offered was 4 LPA. The average package is 3 LPA. Some of the top recruiting companies were Biocon, Icon, Zifo, R&D, etc.
content.Infrastructure: The campus is equipped with highly advanced laboratories with proper machinery and equipment. A big central library with physical and virtual learning materials all available for the students. All the classrooms are equipped with Wi-Fi accessibility. The quality of the food available in the hostel is very good and nutritious, with both vegetarian and non-vegetarian choices.

individual_reviews.course: B.Sc. in Biotechnology - Batch of 2021
individual_reviews.title: Our university has amazing professors and campus but weak placement support.

content.Placements: Only 2 students out of 58 students from our class were placed through campus placements. I was one of them. A few companies visited here for B.Sc biotechnology. The highest salary package offered was 4.1 LPA for the course of B.Sc biotechnology. The lowest salary package offered was 2 LPA. Top recruiters here were Life Cell, Zifo RnD, etc. Internships were not provided by our college, except for a few summer training sessions for which they collected the fee from students. Top roles offered by companies through placements were associate analyst and COVID lab technician.

individual_reviews.course: B.Sc. in Biotechnology - Batch of 2021
individual_reviews.title: Absolutely it is a good college.

content.Placements: About 70 students from our course got placed. The highest academic CGPA got by students is 9.0, while the lowest academic CGPA got by them is 7.0. Many well-known companies like Biocon, etc., visit our college for placements. Our college provides good coaching on placements and training on other interview-related topics to help students get placed in companies and helps in higher studies.
content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure is best-in-class in our college, and modern amenities are also available here. The hostel is best-in-class, and they are separately available for both men and women and also different for different batch students. Classrooms are highly modern, clean and neat throughout the course.

faqs.question: What is the selection process for B Tech and what is the minimum JEE Mains percentile required?
faqs.answer: Hello, The official web page of Crescent School of Life Sciences has not mentioned the scores required on the JEE Main exam by a candidate to get admission. The college only mentions the below infornation as part of the admission process. Students must fulfil the below to get admission to B.Tech course.- A pass in 12th standard exams conducted by State Board/ CBSE/ ISC board or equivalent  with a minimum aggregate of 50%  scores in PCM- Must have given the Crescent Institute Engineering Admission Test (CIEAT 2023) or should have a valid score in JEE (Main)

faqs.question: Can I join Crescent School of Life Sciences directly?
faqs.answer: Hi, The college only provides entrance-based admission for its BTech and M.Tech courses. Below is the infornation on the accepted exams.- BTech: Must have given the Crescent Institute Engineering Admission Test (CIEAT 2023) or should have a valid score in JEE (Main)- Mtech: Must have a valid score in college conducted CPGEE. Other than this, those with a valid score in National level Entrance examination like GATE, TANCET, etc., are exempted from appearing CPGEE.For BSc and MSc admission, however, students must have a valid score in the last qualifying exam, i.e., Class 12 for BSc and in UG degree for admission to MSc. Having said that, students can talk directly wth the admission office of the college for details on direct admission.

faqs.question: Are admissions at Crescent School of Life Sciences entrance-based or merit-based?
faqs.answer: The college only provides entrance-based admission for its BTech and M.Tech courses. Below is the infornation on the accepted exams.- BTech: Must have given the Crescent Institute Engineering Admission Test (CIEAT 2023) or should have a valid score in JEE (Main)- Mtech: Must have a valid score in college conducted CPGEE. Other than this, those with a valid score in National level Entrance examination like GATE, TANCET, etc., are exempted from appearing CPGEE.For BSc and MSc admission, however, students must have a valid score in the last qualifying exam, i.e., Class 12 for BSc and in UG degree for admission to MSc.

faqs.question: Can I get into Crescent School of Life Sciences with 70% in JEE Mains?

The college only mentions the below infornation as part of the admission process. Students must fulfil the below to get admission to B.Tech course.- A pass in 12th standard exams conducted by State Board/ CBSE/ ISC board or equivalent  with a minimum aggregate of 50%  scores in PCM- Must have given the Crescent Institute Engineering Admission Test (CIEAT 2023) or should have a valid score in JEE (Main)

paragraphs: The median package recorded during UG 3-year and UG 4-year placements 2023 was INR 3.7 LPA and 4.25 LPA. This data is as per NIRF report released in 2024. The median package for PG 2-year course was 4.5 LPA.

faqs.question: What was the highest package offered at Crescent School of Life Sciences?
faqs.answer: Hi, The official website of Crescent School does not mention this infromation about the highesr salary. But as per the information on the Shiksha website, the median package for the last three year information is mentioned below: 2019: INR 2.40 LPA 2020: INR 3.12 LPA 2021: INR 3.25 LPA I hope this will give you a fair idea on how the placements actually are.

faqs.question: Who are the top recruiters of Crescent School of Life Sciences?
faqs.answer: As per different reviews that are available on shiskha, students got recruited by different companies like Life Cell and Zifo RnD. If I also tell more details about the recruiting companies, the brochures of different courses mention these companies names: Life Cell, Zifo RnD, TCS, Fortis, CCMB, Micro Labs Limited, Firstsource, etc.

faqs.question: Does Crescent School of Life Sciences have good placements?
faqs.answer: On the official website of Crescent School of Life Sciences, very limited placements data is available. However, on Shiksha, the placements details mention all information as per the NIRF report 2022. As per this report 1,314 out of 2,064 UG and PG students got recruited during Crescent School of Life Sciences placements 2021. Additionally, the median salary or BTech and M.Tech is Rs 4.25 LPA. This seems a decent data to me. But whether it is good or bad depends on your expectations from the college.

faqs.question: Does BSc aviation offers internship at Crescent School of Life Sciences?
faqs.answer: Yes, Crescent School of Life Sciences BSc in Aviation does offers opportunities for internships in both domesticand international airports, airlines, aircraft maintenance organizations, and aerospace companies. The course curriculum also offers practical training sessions that allow students to apply their theoretical knowledge in real-world scenarios. Vistara, Indigo, Akasa Air, Air Asia, etc., are few of the top recruiters of Crescent School of Life Sciences BSc Aviation course.

reviews.review_text: In BSAU-SLS ( LS block), all the courses of life sciences are available such as biotechnology, microbiology, etc. Our campus has open and secured Wi-Fi facility, which makes it easy for us to web search and surf. The food available in the canteen and mess is good, and they follow hygiene standards. Our campus also has a medical centre.

reviews.review_heading: It provides excellent infrastructure, supportive faculty members, and good quality of teaching.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of the campus is excellent. The lab and classroom facilities are good. There is a central library and a separate library in each department block. The quality of the equipment was good. The food served was good. Medical services are very good. We have the main canteen and 2 other canteens where all kinds of food are available are at a low price.

reviews.review_heading: Our college has a top-notch infrastructure and is worth the money.
reviews.review_text: Facilities and infrastructure available here are very good and inspiring. Classrooms are very nice and have good comfortable chairs. Wi-Fi facility is a little bit slow, and due to jammer, your phone network is also slow. However, labs are top-notch, and the library is very good and huge. The hostel has 3 blocks among which the 3rd block is not good. However, the other two blocks are very much good. The food served in the hostel, canteen and mess is good compared to other colleges canteen. The m...

reviews.review_heading: Our college has a good infrastructure, green plants throughout the campus and well-trained teachers.
reviews.review_text: Labs are very well-equipped with senior staff members, a research scholar and assistant. Classrooms are spacious and have projectors. Our college has a central library with more than 10,000 books and also a Wi-Fi network for online courses. Wi-Fi facility is available throughout the campus with a high-speed network. The hostel has very good delicious and hygiene food. Medical facilities are available for 24 hours, along with 2 well-trained doctors and nurses.

reviews.review_heading: Laboratories are well-equipped and provided with good infrastructure.
reviews.review_text: Wi-Fi is not good over certain regions. Labs are well-equipped with the best instruments, and classrooms are spacious and have good aeration. Libraries are provided with few books from our department. Facilities provided in hostels are good. Quality of food available in the mess and canteen is good, and various varieties of food are provided with minimal cost.

reviews.review_heading: Really good infrastructure and facilities.
reviews.review_text: This college has a very good infrastructure. The full campus is enabled with free Wi-Fi. The classrooms are very large and are equipped with projectors for digital learning. The library is great and has separate sections for all departments. Digital Library is also available. Labs are equipped with all advanced machinery and are spacious. The food quality is good. All kinds of sports are encouraged and separate courts are available for all.

reviews.review_heading: I am satisfied because of faculty members, infrastructure and facilities.
reviews.review_text: The campus is enabled with Wi-Fi facility, sufficient lab facilities and both main and department library facilities. Classrooms are spacious enough. Our college provides 24 hours of the medical facility, canteen facility and both indoor games and outdoor sports. There is also a ground facility, and the quality of the food served is good.

reviews.review_heading: Value for money, good infrastructure, good teaching and campus life.
reviews.review_text: Classrooms are Wi-Fi enabled. We have a central Library and even our life Science school has one, which has both digital and hard copy books. There is a 24hr medical facility and for sports v have a separate physical education dept and indoor facilities along with a basketball court, badminton court, football court and a huge ground.

reviews.review_heading: I am completely satisfied with our college.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of our college is eco friendly where every student could enjoy and have a good time with friends. Our college provided many clubs for us, which organises many events every month to engage students in them. Even we will have a passion for it to enjoy.

reviews_list.batch_info: B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering (Artificial Intelligence and Machine Learning) - Batch of 2026
reviews_list.review_title: A satisfying review from me because I am fully satisfied with my college.

review_content.Placements: About 15% of the students were placed in my course i.e., computer science branch. The highest salary package till now is 7 LPA, and the average is about 3 LPA - 4 LPA in our course. The top recruiting companies are Accenture and Infosys but not recently, a long time ago. As freshers expect jobs, so they are ready to do any role for his/her first job. Internships are better if we choose from outside. The internships provided by the college are mostly are collaborated.
review_content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure is well managed and designed nicely. There are 3 blocks that are interconnected, and the other 3 are designed well. There are a total of 5 blocks out of which 2 blocks have integrated libraries and one is the main head branch block where every faculty will be available.

reviews_list.batch_info: B.Tech. in Information Technology - Batch of 2026
reviews_list.review_title: I have good college life here. Now it got autonomous status, I hope the college will grow more.

review_content.Placements: Placements should be improved. They are not good now, we shall see in the future, right now management is working on placements. But currently we have very less opportunities regarding placements. I haven't graduated yet so I have to wait and see if they improve in the future.
review_content.Infrastructure: Facilities and infrastructure of my department are good which is in O block. We get good labs, but we don't have open Wi-Fi for students. You can bring laptops for your classwork or project work, the faculty will share password with you, otherwise no Wi-Fi for students.

review_summary.college_name: Bharat Institute of Engineering and Technology, Telangana Reviews on Placements, Faculty & Facilities

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering - Batch of 2025
individual_reviews.title: Not so good as I expected to be.

content.Placements: I graduated in 2025. About 20% of students are placed with a good package, with packages of nearly 3 LPA and 8 LPA. Top recruiters included TCS, Infosys, and Wipro. 65% of students got internships in firms like TCS and Cognizant. Roles offered included data analyst, software developer, and web developer.
content.Infrastructure: CSE department has well-equipped computer labs, Wi-Fi, smart classrooms, and a resource-rich library. Hostels offer clean rooms, decent mess food, a canteen, basic medical care, and games for physical and mental well-being, and are surrounded by college. There are many boys' and girls' hostels around.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering - Batch of 2025
individual_reviews.title: The knowledge I got from this college is unforgettable and useful.

content.Placements: The placements are amazing from our course in our year, almost 70% of the students got placed in the college placements. The highest package is around 6 LPA, the lowest package is around 3 LPA, and the average package is around 4 LPA. The top recruiting companies like TCS, Wipro, Foxconn, Coulryt, etc. The students who got their internship certificates are about 80% from our course. The top roles like manufacturing and designing are there.
content.Infrastructure: The facilities available in the college are outstanding throughout the academic year. They're providing many facilities like bus transportation, AC labs, seminar halls, library, and free Wi-Fi around the entire campus, project labs, well-ventilated classrooms, etc. The medical services in the college are provided 24/7, with an ambulance facility also, and games and sports are played regularly in the college. The quality of the food in the hostel mess and canteen is also great, with reasonable prices.

individual_reviews.title: Good infrastructure and supportive faculty with decent placements.

content.Placements: I'm currently pursuing B.Tech in CSE (2023-2027) at Bharat Institute of Engineering and Technology. Around 65% of students get placed. Bharat Institute of Engineering and Technology, Telangana TS EAMCET cutoff 2025 was concluded with the release of the final cutoff list. The cutoff was released as opening and closing ranks for the AI and HS quota. In the General category under the HS quota, the last round closing ranks ranged between 44909 and 115912 for B.E. / B.Tech admission. B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering (Cyber Security) was the toughest to get admission into, considering its competitive cutoff rank. In the fi

For B.E. / B.Tech admission, the top three most competitive branches were B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering (Cyber Security), B.Tech. in Electrical and Electronics Engineering and B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering (Artificial Intelligence and Machine Learning), with competitive TS EAMCET last round cutoff ranks of 44909, 51070 and 56495, respectively. These ranks are valid for the students belonging to the General HS quota.

For 2026 admission, candidates can refer to the table below to view some of the important TS EAMCET dates. TS EAMCET is a state-level entrance test for admission to BE, B.Tech, BPharm, PharmD, B.Sc, B.FSc, and BVSc courses.

The TS EAMCET cutoff has been released for admission to Bharat Institute of Engineering and Technology, Telangana. Candidates can view or download the consolidated year-wise and round-wise TS EAMCET cutoff lists in the form of PDF from the table below for admission to the B.E. / B.Tech course.

Candidates can view the other specialisation options available for admission at multiple colleges accepting the TS EAMCET entrance exam. The comparison below is based on the last round cutoff rank of TS EAMCET for the General HS category students.

The Bharat Institute of Engineering and Technology, Telangana MBA cutoff 2025 for the General HS category in the last round was 24962. In contrast, the cutoff in 2024 was 24948, and the 2023 cutoff was 7989 for the aforementioned course and category. According to this data, we can say that the competition for MBA has been decreasing in the last 3 years.

reviews.review_heading: Not so good as I expected to be.
reviews.review_text: CSE department has well-equipped computer labs, Wi-Fi, smart classrooms, and a resource-rich library. Hostels offer clean rooms, decent mess food, a canteen, basic medical care, and games for physical and mental well-being, and are surrounded by college. There are many boys' and girls' hostels around.

reviews.review_heading: The knowledge I got from this college is unforgettable and useful.
reviews.review_text: The facilities available in the college are outstanding throughout the academic year. They're providing many facilities like bus transportation, AC labs, seminar halls, library, and free Wi-Fi around the entire campus, project labs, well-ventilated classrooms, etc. The medical services in the college are provided 24/7, with an ambulance facility also, and games and sports are played regularly in the college. The quality of the food in the hostel mess and canteen is also great, with reasonable pr...

reviews.review_heading: A satisfying review from me because I am fully satisfied with my college.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure is well managed and designed nicely. There are 3 blocks that are interconnected, and the other 3 are designed well. There are a total of 5 blocks out of which 2 blocks have integrated libraries and one is the main head branch block where every faculty will be available.

reviews.review_heading: I have good college life here. Now it got autonomous status, I hope the college will grow more.
reviews.review_text: Facilities and infrastructure of my department are good which is in O block. We get good labs, but we don't have open Wi-Fi for students. You can bring laptops for your classwork or project work, the faculty will share password with you, otherwise no Wi-Fi for students.

reviews.review_heading: Good infrastructure and supportive faculty with decent placements.
reviews.review_text: Our department has well-equipped labs, Wi-Fi, smart classrooms, and a good library. Hostels are decent with basic facilities. Mess food is average. The canteen offers better options. Medical care is available. Sports like cricket and volleyball are active.

reviews.review_heading: This college is the best for studies.
reviews.review_text: My college offers many courses like mechanical engineering, computer science engineering, information technology, data science, and cybersecurity.

reviews.review_heading: The placements from our course are excellent in 2025.
reviews.review_text: The college also provided good facilities which comprise a spacious library, free Wi-Fi points, an assembly hall, seminar rooms, a project workstation, and a waiting lounge within an indoor suite among others. Two categories of facilities were offered to students air-conditioned and non-air-conditioned. Canteen and mess food was delicious and not very expensive. Medical assistance was readily available from a fully qualified doctor in the college medical room. There was no shortage of chances fo...

reviews.review_heading: I am really satisfied with my college. It is a really good college.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure and maintenance are excellent. Wi-Fi, labs, and classwork are hygienic, and I liked it very much.  It was an old college built 25 years ago, but still, it is in the top place. The hostel is also available in this college. It has the best labs.

reviews.review_heading: Sweet college: Memory of my life.
reviews.review_text: Our college atmosphere and infrastructure are very good. Classrooms are very neat and clean. Labs and classrooms consist of PPT. Library contains various types of books and a variety of journals are available on-campus library. Quality of food in canteen is very good.

reviews.review_heading: So far the experience has been good.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure is average. Classrooms are not very high-five or well-structured with AC and all. It's not bad as well. We have a ground and an open area. So it's not like it is very small. The area is big. The infrastructure is overall average. It is not too great. But can't complain.

reviews.review_heading: My college journey is very memorable.
reviews.review_text: Our college infrastructure was very good. The college had good facilities, with many labs and classrooms. Our college library is very good with lots of books and a variety of journals in the campus library. Sports meet and medical facilities are available.

reviews.review_heading: Placements are really amazing in our course.
reviews.review_text: The college provides many facilities like Wi-Fi around the entire campus, libraries, ventilated classrooms, AC labs, seminar halls, big lawns, waiting rooms, an indoor complex, etc. A top quality rating is given to the hostel management for providing great facilities like good and clean rooms and delicious food at reasonable prices, including the canteen. The emergency doctors are available for students throughout the day. Sports and games are unlimited in the college.

reviews.review_heading: The college is good, and we can join it if we want a certificate.
reviews.review_text: Facilities are good. We do not have proper labs. Most of the classrooms are good. The library is even good. Good quality of food is present in the canteen. We have all kinds of sports.

reviews.review_heading: Good infrastructure and facilities.
reviews.review_text: Bharat Institute of Engineering and Technology has an impressive infrastructure with numerous classrooms. Our college provides ample space for sports and extracurricular activities, with three dedicated playgrounds. The library is a major highlight, offering a wide collection of books along with a digital library. It has many different blocks. It is a big campus.

reviews.review_heading: I'm giving review about Bharat College.
reviews.review_text: There was big library in our college, world the biggest library in our college. There were different labs and different rooms for your college. Classrooms were also very neat and clean. There was have very available in our college. There was very the biggest ground.

reviews_list.review_title: Decent college, if you want only a degree in minimum fests, then you take admission in this college.

review_content.Placements: Only 1 per cent of students got a placement. Also, no bigger companies came to the college. The highest package is 10 lakhs per annum, and the average package is 4 lakhs per annum, but this is not real. Only a few got a 2-3 lakh package. Only CSE students got placed.
review_content.Infrastructure: College is very small, with only 2-3 buildings. I cannot see students playing in the playground, only trails are taken. College has volleyball, kabaddi, cricket, football grounds and also some indoor games like table tennis, chess, and carrom.

reviews_list.batch_info: B.Tech. in Information Technology - Batch of 2024
reviews_list.review_title: College is excellent.

review_content.Placements: About 60% of students got placed from this course. The highest package is about 4 LPA. There are many IT companies here offering job opportunities. 50% of students got internships from our college in different IT companies. Roles offered are data scientist and web developer.
review_content.Infrastructure: Facilities are good in this college. Canteen food is also okay but it is good according to price. The food is served of many varieties in the canteen and it is also delicious.
review_content.Faculty: Faculty members are good. They are very hard-working and passionate about their work. Teachers are very helpful and they always give their 100% for us. They always prepare us according to the companies or industry. Our university is RGPV and semester exams are hard but if you still prepare for it then you can archive marks as you want.

reviews_list.batch_info: B.Tech. in Information Technology - Batch of 2027
reviews_list.review_title: Average package and facilities .

review_content.Placements: In our college, 80% of students get placed and our college offers the highest packages at 26 Lacs on Flipkart and average packages of about 3–6 Lacs per annum. The top recording companies are TCS and another company, and 70% of students got internships at our college .
review_content.Infrastructure: Facilities and good Wi-Fi is not reachable, providing very slow internet speed and that's very good classroom and library are also very good in our college hostel facilities, which are not given by the management; the regular thali costs 25 rupees and provides 4 rotis.

Our college has a good reputation, which helps us in interviews. More than 20 to 30 companies come for recruitment. Internship programmes are there for building students knowledge about work.
content.Infrastructure: Infrastructure of the college is very good. Our College has a very big ground nearby of 5 acres. Hostel is very big, with 4000 students living there. The hostel gives good quality food and a variety of foods, Wi-Fi, mineral water, and many more.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Computer Science Engineering - Batch of 2025
individual_reviews.title: Decent college, if you want only a degree in minimum fests, then you take admission in this college.

content.Placements: Only 1 per cent of students got a placement. Also, no bigger companies came to the college. The highest package is 10 lakhs per annum, and the average package is 4 lakhs per annum, but this is not real. Only a few got a 2-3 lakh package. Only CSE students got placed.
content.Infrastructure: College is very small, with only 2-3 buildings. I cannot see students playing in the playground, only trails are taken. College has volleyball, kabaddi, cricket, football grounds and also some indoor games like table tennis, chess, and carrom.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Information Technology - Batch of 2024
individual_reviews.title: College is excellent.

content.Placements: About 60% of students got placed from this course. The highest package is about 4 LPA. There are many IT companies here offering job opportunities. 50% of students got internships from our college in different IT companies. Roles offered are data scientist and web developer.
content.Infrastructure: Facilities are good in this college. Canteen food is also okay but it is good according to price. The food is served of many varieties in the canteen and it is also delicious.
content.Faculty: Faculty members are good. They are very hard-working and passionate about their work. Teachers are very helpful and they always give their 100% for us. They always prepare us according to the companies or industry. Our university is RGPV and semester exams are hard but if you still prepare for it then you can archive marks as you want.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Information Technology - Batch of 2027
individual_reviews.title: Average package and facilities .

content.Placements: In our college, 80% of students get placed and our college offers the highest packages at 26 Lacs on Flipkart and average packages of about 3–6 Lacs per annum. The top recording companies are TCS and another company, and 70% of students got internships at our college .
content.Infrastructure: Facilities and good Wi-Fi is not reachable, providing very slow internet speed and that's very good classroom and library are also very good in our college hostel facilities, which are not given by the management; the regular thali costs 25 rupees and provides 4 rotis.

faqs.question: What is the eligibility to get admission in Swami Vivekanand College of Engineering, Indore for UG/PG courses?
faqs.answer:
Swami Vivekanand College of Engineering, Indore has below criteria for taking admissions to it's various courses:CoursesEligibilityAfter 10th DiplomaCandidate must have passed 10th class examination/SSC examination or equivalent examination from any recognised board/center (10+2) system.M.E./M.TechCandidate must have completed B.E./B.Tech. in relevant branch of Engg./Technology with above mentioned percentage.
The mentioned SC/ST percentage is for Madhya Pradesh residents.
Candidate belonging to OBC (excluding creamy layer) categories of Madhya Pradesh should have at least 45%.
Bachelors degree should be of minimum of four years duration and have been obtained from any AICTE approved institution or Indian University/ Institute or from a foreign University recognised by AIU or any Institutes of national importance (i.e. IITs/ IISc/NITs etc.) duly recognised by the MHRD, as equivalent thereto.
Candidates in the Final year of above degree examinations can also apply on provisional basis.

admission_overview.college_name: DYPSOET Admission 2025: Courses, Eligibility, Application Process, Fee

admission_process.title: DYPSOET Pune Admission Process 2025

paragraphs: DYPSOET Pune admissionsare primarily entrance-based. The school underUniPuneconsiders national or state-level entrance exam scores for admission to specific courses.DYPSOEToffers 10 full-time courses at UG, PG and diploma levels. Interested candidates can apply online on the institute website for admission.

DYPSOET offers BE at the UG level and ME at the PG level. Besides, the institute also offers diploma courses in the Engineering stream. Candidates need to fulfil the course-specific eligibility criteria to apply for admission. Below areDYPSOET coursesalong with their eligibility and selection criteria:
JEE Main/MHT CET+ CAP
GATE/MHTCET MTech
Note:In the absence of information, the eligibility and selection criteria is taken from an unofficial course.

The institute affiliated to UniPune offers admission to candidates based on their entrance-exam scores. Besides, aspirants also need to fulfil the eligibility criteria for the applied course. Below are the steps to get a seat in DYPSOET:
Step 1: DYPSOET Application Process 2025
The mode of application is online. Candidates wishing to take admission through CAP must apply forMHT CET CAP. For institute-level seats, aspirants can apply on the official website of DYPSOET.
Step 2:Selection

Candidates with a valid score in JEE Main or MHT CET are selected for participation in the Common Admission Process for BE. For ME, aspirants need to qualify GATE or MHT CET MTech exams. Once selected, candidates are required to participate in the counselling round. The institute releases a merit list on notice board and official website.
Step 3: Counselling & Admission Confirmation

After completion of the selection process, registered aspirants are offered seats through CAP. In case vacancy after all the CAP rounds are over, the institute invites applications from the candidates. The application form is valid for both CAP vacant and institute-level seats. Aspirants who are offered seat need to payDYPSOET feeto confirm their admission in the institute.

faqs.question: Can I get direct admission in Dr. D. Y. Patil School of Engineering and Technology?
faqs.answer: Dr. D. Y. Patil School of Engineering and Technology Pune does not offer direct admission. Candidates need to first registration for accepted entrance exam followed by MHT CET CAP for UG and PG courses. Admission to BE is based on JEE Main or MHT CET scores whereas, GATE or MHT CET M.Tech is considered for ME courses. Besides, aspirants who are applying for Diploma programmes do not have to appear for an entrance exam. They are selected based on their merit in the last qualifying exam.

faqs.question: How are seats offered at DYPSOET Pune?

faqs.question: What are the career prospects of pursuing a BE at Dr DY Patil School of Engineering and Technology?
faqs.answer: The career prospects of pursuing a Bachelor of Engineering or BE are similar to the career prospects of pursuing a BTech. Candidates can pursue higher studies with courses like MTech, ME, MBA, etc. Alternatively, they can take up a job in the private or the government sector. Some jobs the DYPSOET Pune BE graduates can take up are tabulated below: Check out the following table presenting the expected average salary that BVCOE Pune BE graduates can get for various job profiles: Engineering Job Profile Average Annual Salary (in INR) Software Engineer 7.7 LPA Data Scientist 13.4 LPA Civil Engineer 4.6 LPA Electronics Engineer 3.4 LPA Mechanical Engineer 4.3 LPA Note:- The salaries have been taken from the external sources, and hence may vary.

faqs.question: What are the career prospects of pursuing an M.Tech at Dr DY Patil School of Engineering and Technology?
faqs.answer: Dr DY Patil School of Engineering and Technology does not offer an MTech. Instead, it offers a Master of Engineering (ME) as a PG-level programme in the field of Engineering. However, the course offers similar career prospects to that of an MTech. The prospects depend on the candidates' choice of specialisation. In general, DYPSOET Pune ME degree holders can also pursue careers in areas like project management, research & development, or engineering consultancy. The table below highlights some of the most sought-after ME job profiles in India, along with their respective estimated average annual salary: ME Jobs Average M Tech Salary (INR) VLSI Design Engineer INR 13.5 LPA Embedded Systems Engineer INR 6.6 LPA Data Scientist INR 14.7 LPA Communication Systems Engineer INR 9 LPA Artificial Intelligence Engineer INR 12.5 LPA Computer Aided Design (CAD) Engineer INR 4.5 LPA Software Developer IR 8 LPA Project Manager INR 5.5 LPA Note- The above salary has been taken from external sources, and hence may vary.

faqs.question: Does DYPSOET Pune offer placement support to ME students?
faqs.answer: Yes, DYPSOET Pune provides placement to students enrolled in its ME programme. Every year, various recruiters are invited to conduct placement drives at the campus. These recruiters include Finserv, Kaar Tech, Netcore cloud, Infogain, etc. As of now, the exact data on ME placements at DYPSOET Pune is not available. However, based on the overall placement data, the highest package offered across various courses in 2021 was INR 8.50 LPA. As per the student reviews, the placement record of the Computer Engineering stream is quite good.

college_info.college_name: RKDF University, Ranchi: Courses, Fees, Admission 2025, Placements, Ranking

highlights.summary: RKDF University, Ranchi admissions 2025 are open. Candidates can apply for the respective courses by visiting the official website of the university.

college_info.intro: RKDF University, Ranchi offers various UG and PG courses to students. The flagship programmes offered at this university are BTech, BBA, and MBA. Apart from this, the university also offers BA and D.Pharma programmes across various streams. Candidates can check some of the popular programmes offered at RKDF University, Ranchi in the table provided below:

faqs.answer: A:    RKDF University accepts students to its UG, PG and Diploma programmes on the basis of merit obtained by them in the relevant qualifying exam. However, those seeking admissions in the PhD programmes offered at the university, must clear the entrance exam followed by an interview. Those who have cleared UGC/ CSIR/ National or State level fellowship or cleared GATE/GPAT/SLET/NET shall be exempted from PhD entrance test. For further details, candidates can contact the admission office of the university.
faqs.question: Can I get admission at RKDF University, Ranchi without an entrance exam?

faqs.answer: A:    RKDF University Ranchi offers over twenty five programmes in several streams such as Arts, Science, Commerce and Management. The below-mentioned table contains the total tuition fee for some of the popular courses provided at RKDF University Ranchi:Course NameTotal Tuition Fee (Investment)BAINR 72,000BScINR 96,000 - INR 2.1 lakhBA LLBINR 2 lakhBTechINR 3.6 lakhUG DiplomaINR 20,000 - INR 80,000BBAINR 2.1 Lacs - INR 3 lakhMBAINR 2.8 lakhMCAINR 1.9 lakhBMCINR 1.5 lakhBSWINR 1.2 lakhMComINR 60,000
faqs.question: What is the fee structure for the courses offered at RKDF University, Ranchi?

faqs.answer: A:    The total duration of the BBA programme offered at RKDF University Ranchi is three years. The course is divided into six semesters of six months each. The university offers BBA in Hotel Management and BBA in Corporate along with BBA (gen). The total tuition fee of the BBA programme offered at RKDF University ranges between INR 1.7 Lacs - INR 3 lakh. For further details regarding the BBA programme, the students can click here.
faqs.question: What is the duration and fee of the BBA course offered at RKDF University, Ranchi?

faqs.answer: A:    Yes, you can join the Bachelor of Science programme offered at RKDF University Ranchi without appearing for any entrance exam as the university select students on the basis of merit secured by them in Class 12 or its equivalent exam for its BSc programme. As the admissions are merit-based, the applicants need not appear for any entrance exam if they are seeking admissions in the BSc course at RKDF University Ranchi.
faqs.question: Can I join BSc course at RKDF University, Ranchi without any entrance exam?

reviews_list.batch_info: Bachelor of Computer Applications (BCA) - Batch of 2025
reviews_list.review_title: RKDF University, Ranchi is the best college for those who want a good environment.

review_content.Placements: 80% of students get placed in the company. The highest package was 10 LPA and the lowest was 1 LPA. Product-based companies come for placement, like Infosys, Adrika Enterprises, etc. 60% of students get into big companies. Developer and project manager are the top roles offered.
review_content.Infrastructure: The campus is totally clean and anti-ragging. Classrooms are so big and fully comfortable. All books are available in the library. Hostel facilities are also available on the campus itself. Hostel food is just so good. There are also so many activities to enjoy.

reviews_list.batch_info: Bachelor of Computer Applications (BCA) - Batch of 2026
reviews_list.review_title: A great note of our college THE RKDF UNIVERSITY RANCHI WHERE A GREAT STUDY AVAIL.

review_content.Placements: The starting salary for the lower package is 300,000 rupees per annum, while the higher package amounts to 2.1 million rupees per annum. Companies such as Wipro, Infratech, and several others offer these packages. Numerous students secured internships this year with companies like Wipro, Infosys, Infratech, and many more. These students consistently prioritize their studies and successfully accomplish their goals.
review_content.Infrastructure: All subjects are equipped with laboratories, and we have a well-furnished classroom and library with Wi-Fi access, among other facilities. Additionally, all faculties have access to mess and medical services, among others. The teachers strive to excel in their profession and contribute to the progress of the nation. They work diligently to support their families and achieve the best outcomes.

courses.overview: RKDF University, Ranchi Courses & Fees 2025 Students can choose from various course options available at RKDF University, Ranchi. Admission is offered based on merit or entrance exam scores of the candidates. The table below provides an overview of the programmes offered, along with their tuition fees and the necessary qualifications for enrollment:

fee_structure.heading: RKDF University, Ranchi Courses & Fees 2025
fee_structure.overview: Students can choose from various course options available at RKDF University, Ranchi. Admission is offered based on merit or entrance exam scores of the candidates. The table below provides an overview of the programmes offered, along with their tuition fees and the necessary qualifications for enrollment:

faqs.answer: At RKDF University Ranchi students are offered a three-year undergraduate degree in Bachelor of Business Administration across several specialisations. The interested candidates who want to get admission to the BBA programme offered at the university need to have cleared Class 12 or its equivalent from any stream with a minimum aggregate of 45% from a recognised board to be eligible for the BBA programme.
faqs.question: Q: What is the eligibility for BBA course at RKDF University, Ranchi?

faqs.answer: Yes, you can get direct admission in RKDF University Ranchi as the university offers admissions to students for its offered undegraduate, postgraduate, diploma programmes on the basis of merit obtained by them in the qualifying examination for the relevant courses. However, for the PhD programme offered at the university, the candidates need to clear the entrance exam along with appearing for an interview round. Those with valid scores in relevant exams will be exempted from the entrance test for the doctorate programme.
faqs.question: Q: Can I get direct admission to RKDF University, Ranchi?

faqs.answer: Yes, RKDF University is a good university and is one of the renowned universities, located in Ranchi. It is a highly prestigious college, recognised by the state government, and is also a member of AIU (Association of Indian Universities). The university offers UG and PG courses across Management, Science, and Arts streams. These courses are designed to provide students with the necessary skills and knowledge for their chosen field. RKDF University, Ranchi also offers great infrastructural facilities to its students such as lecture halls, conference halls, laboratories, a library, and hostels.
faqs.question: Q: Is RKDF University, Ranchi good?

faqs.answer: RKDF University Ranchiuniversity offers a wide range of undergraduate, postgraduate and Diploma programmes such as BA, BSc, BCom, MCA, MSW, PGDM, DPharma, MBA and more in multiple streams such as Management, Engineering, Arts, Science, etc. The university admission is done on merit-basis and also offers PhD in several courses. Further, the college offers programmes in regular mode and in full time mode. Candidates seeking admission to the MBA programme must be graduated with atleast 50 % from a recognised university.
faqs.question: Q: How can I take admission at RKDF University Ranchi?

individual_reviews.title: RKDF university Ranchi review .

content.Placements: On average, 50 percent of total students were placed in this college and the highest package is 5 lacs, the lowest package is 2 lacs, and the average is just 2.50 lacs. The top recruiting companies are TCS, Byju's, and many more.
content.Infrastructure: Infrastructure is good for studying, the library is good and our college provides all the books students need. Wi-Fi is also available at this college, and the classrooms are also very good and large. Our college are also provides hostel for the students.

admission_process.title: RKDF University Ranchi Admission Process 2025

paragraphs: RKDF University Ranchi admissionis done on merit-basis. The university offers undergraduate, postgraduate and diploma programmes such asBA,BSc,BCom,MCA,MSW,PGDM,DPharma,MBAand more in multiple streams such as Management, Engineering, Arts, Science, etc. The university also offers PhD in several courses.RKDF University Ranchioffers the programmes in regular mode. Students can submit the application form in both offline and online modes. RKDF University Ranchi is recgonised by UGC.

RKDF University Ranchi accepts students to all of its programmes on the basis of academic merit achieved in past qualifying exams. All of the courses at are offered at RKDF University Ranchi are through regular mode. Find below the key highlights forRKDF University Ranchi admissions:

RKDF University Ranchi feevaries depending on the programme selected by the student. The overall tuition fee of the university ranges between INR 30,000 to INR 3.6 lakh. This doesn’t include the exam and hostel fee. The students have to pay one-time admission fee of INR 5,000 that is non-refundable and an exam fee of INR 1,500 per semester. The below-mentioned table contains the total tuition fee for the courses provided at RKDF University Ranchi:
Note:This information is sourced from official website/ sanctioning body and is subject to change.

RKDF University Ranchi admission process includes several steps. The college offers admissions to its programmes on merit-basis and accepts the admission forms in both offline and online modes. Interested candidates can visit the official website of RKDF University Ranchi to obtain the application form. Below is the step-wiseadmission process of RKDF University Ranchi:
Step 1: RKDF University Ranchi Application Process

Eligible candidates can buy the admission form from admission offices of the university by paying INR 1,000. Alternatively, application form can also be downloaded from the RKDF University Ranchi official website. The duly filled in application form with black/blue ink in Capital Letters without overwriting along with the Demand Draft of INR 1000 drawn in favor of RKDF University Ranchi payable at Ranchi should be sent to the admission office.
Step 2: Selection Process
Once the registration is done, the candidates who fulfill the eligibility will be shortlisted on merit-basis.
Step 3: Counselling and Fee Payment

Once the candidates are shortlisted, they will be contacted by the college for counselling. The shortlisted candidates will have to pay the course fee and submit the required documents to confirm their seat in the college.

reviews.review_text: There are separate classrooms for seniors and juniors. All departments labs are available and library is also provided. All labs are good and well-equipped with the latest equipment according to the industry needs. The hostel is good and you can rate it 3/5. Mess facilities are provided. All indoor and outdoor games, CCTV facilities, and separate hostel for boys and girls in our college. There are always guards around the hostel gate.

reviews.review_heading: There are good infrastructure and facilities here.
reviews.review_text: The hostel is pretty good here with good condition of living. Seniors are more supportive than expected, so you will get very much support from them. There's no ragging environment also. Our college has good Wi-Fi with a minimum speed of 7 Mbps. Classrooms are pretty huge. The library has a good collection and a good number of books, and you can complete the entire subject without purchasing books.

reviews.review_heading: It is not very good but an average university.
reviews.review_text: It has advanced computer labs and a decent library. There is average food in the hostel. It is generally considered good, with nutritious and hygienic food being provided. It also provides a library, hostel, transport, canteen, cafeteria, playground, and indoor games. It has a Wi-Fi campus.

reviews.review_heading: Good helpful teachers but be ready to hustle for law-specific placement.
reviews.review_text: Infrastructure is not too good but average. I did not live in the hostel but the classroom is good. Some have digital boards. In my university, all facilities are available like moot courts for practical learning, auditorium, seminar hall, playground, etc. College also provides canteen and food quality is good.

reviews.review_heading: Overall a good choice. I would recommend joining this college.
reviews.review_text: The hostel is average. It is outside the college campus but within walking distance. So that's a plus point. You will get food from the college mess. It's good like homemade well-cooked food. You will be provided with a variety of food options. The labs and classrooms are spacious. The college has Wi-Fi. The canteen food is great.

The syllabus includes some core subjects, interesting electives, and lab work that gives detailed knowledge to the students about the workings of the field.

faqs.answer: The syllabus for the B Tech EE course focuses on both aspects because they are equally important for you to do well at the workplace in the future. individual_reviews.title: Very good college in this area. All facilities are available on the campus. Everything is good.

description: KIPM Engineering College cutoff 2025 has been announced for admission to BTech programme for all categories and rounds in the both the All India and Home State quota. Students can scroll to the exam-wise sections below for details about KIPM Engineering College UPTAC Cutoff 2025 and other exams. A few more exam-related updates are in the pointers below:

The KIPM Engineering College cutoff 2024 was concluded for JEE Main with the release of the final cutoff list. The cutoff was released as the opening and closing ranks for admission to the BE/BTech, courses. During the KIPM Engineering College BE/BTech cutoff 2024, the last-round closing ranks ranged between 887591 and 1325267 for the General AI category students. Of all the BE/BTech specialisations, the one that faced fierce competition was B.Tech in Computer Science and Engineering (Artificial

The JEE Main cutoff 2024 was released for the General, OBC, ST, SC, EWS, and PWD categories in the AI quota. Considering the last round 2024 cutoff, B.Tech in Computer Science and Engineering (Artificial Intelligence and Machine Learning) was the most sought-after BE/BTech specialization with a closing rank of 887591 for the general AI quota. The closing cutoff for the same stood at 754786 in 2023.

KIPM College of Engineering and Technology (KIPM) accepts JEE Main scores, followed by JoSAA and CSAB counselling rounds for admission to BTech and Integrated BTech courses. Candidates seeking admission to KIPM Engineering College can refer to the table below for tentative JEE Main schedule.

KIPM Engineering College JEE Main cutoff 2024 is now over for BTech, Integrated BTech, and BArch courses. For JEE Main, a total of five counselling rounds were conducted. Additionally, two CSAB counselling rounds were also conducted to fill the vacant seats. reviews.review_heading: Very good college in this area. All facilities are available on the campus. Everything is good.
reviews.review_text: Facilities and infrastructure available in my college are very good. In this area, this is the best college. The hostel is also very good. I am a hostel student so I know about the hostel facility. Medical facilities are also very good, only for normal diseases.

reviews.review_heading: Very good infrastructure and facilities in college, and good placement.
reviews.review_text: College hostel is very good. Every facility is available. Hostel canteen and mess are good, and the hostel medical facility is also good, but only for normal diseases, not for high-level diseases. If you have a normal fever, you can take the medicine. The first innovation lab in Gorakhpur is in our college.

reviews.review_heading: My college is the best in terms of location and is very famous in the area.
reviews.review_text: Facilities and infrastructure available at my college are very bad, but the classrooms and library are good. The quality of food available in the mess and canteen is very bad and tasteless. The medical facilities are good. Facilities for sports and games are good.

reviews.review_heading: All the amenities are provided and good placements are provided to all students.
reviews.review_text: In our college, the facilities are very good. All classrooms are very neat, clean, and fully air-conditioned. We have smart classes. Library, canteen, cafe, and many other amenities are available in my college. The hostel food is awesome and greatful things.

reviews.review_heading: It doesn't feel like college, it feels like school. You do not get half-day even if you are sick.
reviews.review_text: The quality is average and not that good. Facilities are also not great. There is no ground and classrooms are also not that great. They didn't even provide AC and library is for show only we are not allowed to go and study in it. After 1st year mess food is also not of good quality.

reviews.review_heading: "Empowering Futures: KIPM College of Engineering and Technology"
reviews.review_text: All the facilities and infrastructure are provided in our college and in our department such as- Central Library, All laboratories , Classrooms, Auditoriums, Seminar halls, Administrative block, IT Infrastructures, and other facilities such as Hostel, cafe, canteen and many more.

reviews.review_heading: I would recommend students to join this college.
reviews.review_text: Facilities were good. Hostel was great. Our campus was not Wi-Fi enabled. There was a decent library in this college. Laboratories were decent. Games were conducted on our campus. The food served in the hostel was good. Canteen was decent.

reviews.review_heading: I am very satisfied with faculty members, placements, and infrastructure of this college.
reviews.review_text: Facilities are very good. Our campus is Wi-Fi enabled. We have to ask for the password from teachers to get access to the internet. Laboratories are very good. There is a decent library in this college. We can study peacefully in the library if we do not want to attend classes.

reviews.review_heading: It is a good college for students.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of our college was good. All the facilities were available like Wi-Fi, labs, classrooms, and libraries. The quality of the hostel facilities was good. It provided clean rooms and served good food. Medical facilities and sports were available for hostelers.

reviews.review_heading: It is a good private college.
reviews.review_text: All labs are good. Computer labs are equipped with Wi-Fi and air-conditioners. The hostel is good. Around 3 students can stay in each room. The hostel room has a bathroom and water heater. The canteen is decent. The food served in the canteen is healthy. The hostel warden is friendly. Our college provides separate hostels for boys and girls.

reviews.review_heading: Review of KIPM College of Engineering and Technology.
reviews.review_text: There was no Wi-Fi in our college. Our college had decent labs with decent machines. All classrooms were good and spacious. Our college had a peaceful library, which had a good collection of books and magazines. The hostel was decent, but the food served in the mess was below average. The campus had a medical store. There were no games or sports in our college. Our college had not provided a single volleyball game. If you want to play during a lunch break, you have to bring it with you.

reviews.review_heading: Campus life here is more like school life.
reviews.review_text: While compared to other colleges, our institute is one of the best for facilities like transportation, food, campus etc. Hostels are very neat and spacious between two beds and very hygienic. The infrastructure of our college is good, with well-equipped laboratories and talented tutors. We get all the facilities, including food, health, sports, library, hostel, classrooms and laboratories, and the living space is also neat and clean. The best part of being a Sagein is that our university is situ...

reviews.review_heading: The college is good for studies and not for sports .
reviews.review_text: Transport facilities are good in this college. Classrooms are average in size but seminar hall is available for every department. There is neither a sports environment in college nor any playground. Only one canteen is available for both hostels as well as all the departments. That is absolutely not good.

reviews.review_heading: The infrastructure and labs are the worst.
reviews.review_text: Wi-Fi is not available. Labs are the worst. Instruments don't work properly. Classrooms are okay. The library is the worst. No library period is provided for us. The college doesn't support us. Hostel facilities are not available.

reviews.review_heading: I am satisfied because of the quality of education provided by the college.
reviews.review_text: All facilities are good here except for sports and games. The college does not have a playground or a basketball court. There is no digital library. Only three-course books can be issued at a time from the library, and we have to get renewed within 14 days from the issue date.
