reviews_list.review_title: This college is a big regret of every student, poor placements, poor campus infrastructure.

review_content.Placements: Not very good college in terms of placements as there are companies visiting campus premises for hiring procedures, but most of the companies are coming just to introduce us to their courses and then try to sell them to us with fake promises and conditions required for placement assistance that are impossible to fulfill.
review_content.Infrastructure: Infrastructure is very poor. There have been moments when the roof fell on the ground and luckily no people are present there, but we can never be safe inside. No air-conditioned classrooms, no facilities in terms of water in water coolers and washrooms, equipment are not in working condition and many are not even present, no Wi-Fi facilities. No hostel facility, students outside Delhi have to search for flats on rent and PGs for themselves.

reviews_list.batch_info: B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering - Batch of 2027
reviews_list.review_title: Absolutely dissatisfied with placement, infrastructure, facilities of GB Plant Engineering College.

review_content.Placements: Placement rate is 1–10 percent. The highest/the lowest/average package: 4 LPA / 2.5 LPA / 3–3.5 LPA (approximately). Top recruiters are mostly mass recruiters (TCS, Infosys, Capgemini, Wipro) and smaller IT/local firms. Internship rate and companies: low, around 10–20 percent. Startups, small local companies, or self-sourced. Top roles: trainee engineer, junior developer, system engineer.
review_content.Infrastructure: Old, poorly maintained buildings. We have no Wi-Fi. Labs use outdated PCs, but there are sufficient systems for all students. Teachers don’t come to labs at all, chilling in their rooms while students mark attendance and leave. We do not have hostels; even people from other states live in nearby PG's.

reviews_list.batch_info: B.Tech. in Electronics and Communication Engineering - Batch of 2022
reviews_list.review_title: Gb pant government engineering college review.

review_content.Placements: Placements of the college are average. Most of the students get placed in Wipro, oracle, TCS and Infosys. Some students are placed in byjus, amazon, rtds hcl, etc. The highest package is 45 LPA and the lowest is 3.5 LPA. Top recruiting companies are tcs, Infosys and Wipro. Top role is software developer.
review_content.Infrastructure: Infrastructure is poor and the classrooms are average. Wi-Fi is available in the college and the library is average. Labs are good. individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Mechanical and Automation Engineering - Batch of 2027
individual_reviews.title: G B Plant Engineering College: Once a renowned technical college, it is slowly turning into runs.

content.Placements: A very low percentage of students rely on the college placement cell as they offer an average package of around 3 LPA to 6 LPA. But Maruti is the only strong recruiter for otherwise small startups. Last passout batch chose off-campus placement. Many times, roles are not according to your qualifications. Some call centres also recruit from here.
content.Infrastructure: College doesn't have any hostel & in terms of infrastructure, the fresher batch doesn't have any AICTE approval. Poor maintenance is ruining the labs, as they are conducting experiments on virtual labs. No Wi-Fi, sports & games funds never used, and a poor canteen. The library is well-maintained.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Electronics and Communication Engineering - Batch of 2026
individual_reviews.title: This college is a big regret of every student, poor placements, poor campus infrastructure.

content.Placements: Not very good college in terms of placements as there are companies visiting campus premises for hiring procedures, but most of the companies are coming just to introduce us to their courses and then try to sell them to us with fake promises and conditions required for placement assistance that are impossible to fulfill.
content.Infrastructure: Infrastructure is very poor. There have been moments when the roof fell on the ground and luckily no people are present there, but we can never be safe inside. No air-conditioned classrooms, no facilities in terms of water in water coolers and washrooms, equipment are not in working condition and many are not even present, no Wi-Fi facilities. No hostel facility, students outside Delhi have to search for flats on rent and PGs for themselves.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering - Batch of 2027
individual_reviews.title: Absolutely dissatisfied with placement, infrastructure, facilities of GB Plant Engineering College.

content.Placements: Placement rate is 1–10 percent. The highest/the lowest/average package: 4 LPA / 2.5 LPA / 3–3.5 LPA (approximately). Top recruiters are mostly mass recruiters (TCS, Infosys, Capgemini, Wipro) and smaller IT/local firms. Internship rate and companies: low, around 10–20 percent. Startups, small local companies, or self-sourced. Top roles: trainee engineer, junior developer, system engineer.
content.Infrastructure: Old, poorly maintained buildings. We have no Wi-Fi. Labs use outdated PCs, but there are sufficient systems for all students. Teachers don’t come to labs at all, chilling in their rooms while students mark attendance and leave. We do not have hostels; even people from other states live in nearby PG's.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Electronics and Communication Engineering - Batch of 2022
individual_reviews.title: Gb pant government engineering college review.

content.Placements: Placements of the college are average. Most of the students get placed in Wipro, oracle, TCS and Infosys. Some students are placed in byjus, amazon, rtds hcl, etc. The highest package is 45 LPA and the lowest is 3.5 LPA. Top recruiting companies are tcs, Infosys and Wipro. Top role is software developer.
content.Infrastructure: Infrastructure is poor and the classrooms are average. Wi-Fi is available in the college and the library is average. Labs are good. Hostel is not available in the college. Neither mess nor canteen is available. Good medical facilities are not present. Sports and games are very good.

A:    University College of Engineering, Kancheepuram, Anna University has below criteria for taking admissions to it's various courses: CoursesEligibilityB.E. / B.TechCandidate must have passed VIII, IX, X, XI & XII Std. from schools situated in Tamil Nadu.
Tamil Nadu native candidate who have passed any of the VIII, IX, X, XI & XII Std. or their equivalent exam from schools situated outside Tamil Nadu can also apply. They should produce Original Nativity Certificate.
Children of Central Government Employees, irrespective of their nativity, provided their parents or guardians (only if both parents are not alive) have been serving in Tamil Nadu continuously for the past five years can be eligible to apply.
Sons & daughters of All India service Tamil Nadu cadre officers are eligible to apply. A Self declaration from the parent in this regard is to be produced.
Children of employees in the Public Sector or Government recognised institutions had been working in their organisations for the past five years are also eligible, irrespective of their domicile.
Other State candidates who have studied VIII, IX, X, XI and XII Std. in Tamil Nadu are eligible to apply.

individual_reviews.course: B.E. in Computer Science and Engineering - Batch of 2025
individual_reviews.title: It has a nice course curriculum. It is the best college.

content.Placements: 60% of students get placed in our course. The package offered ranges from 3-4 LPA. TCS, Cognizant, Wipro, and Infosys are the top recruiting companies that visited our college for placements. Everyone got paid internships by their efforts only. In computer science and engineering, the top roles offered are software engineer, system engineer, software trainee, data analyst, etc.
content.Infrastructure: There are a total of 2 labs for the CSE department which contain more than 40 monitors in a single lab. Wi-Fi is provided regularly without disconnection. Classrooms are extra large which is very comfortable for students and staff members. It has one library which is pretty neat and contains all department books.

individual_reviews.course: B.E. in Electrical and Electronics Engineering - Batch of 2023
individual_reviews.title: APCE is a successful career.

content.Placements: Adhiparasakthi College of Engineering (APCE), established in 2001, was affiliated with Anna University and offered placements with companies like TVS, Wipro, and others, with packages from low to high, internships, and industrial visits (IV). Top recruiting companies are Infosys, HCL, and TVS, with most project companies.
content.Infrastructure: Adhiparasakthi College of Engineering (APCE) in Kalavai offers a range of facilities to support all courses, like Wi-Fi, labs, and a library. All food prices are low, and healthy foods are provided and transport over 50 km surrounding.

individual_reviews.course: B.E. in Electrical and Electronics Engineering - Batch of 2021
individual_reviews.title: Good placements with affordable fees.

content.Placements: My experience with placement was good. The placement cell is very good here. They also provide preparation classes for interviews. The average package was INR 5 LPA last year. Top recruiting companies are Bajaj, BEL, Havells, etc. Internships are provided according to the interests of students.
content.Infrastructure: The campus is lush, green, and beautiful. All kinds of facilities are available according to the requirements of students. A Wi-Fi facility is available for students, and the labs are well-equipped. We live in a double-shared room. The room is good and furnished. Mess is near the hostel, and food is good here. Sports days are organized regularly at our college.

individual_reviews.course: B.E. in Mechanical Engineering - Batch of 2023
individual_reviews.title: I am very satisfied with faculty members and placements.

content.Placements: Every student is eligible for placements. Training is conducted for recruitment. Arrear students are also eligible for placement training. The placement opportunity is less for the mechanical compared to the IT core field. The minimum salary package offered ranges between 2 LPA - 3 LPA. The maximum salary package offered varies between 5 LPA - 6 LPA.
content.Infrastructure: Classrooms and library are well maintained. Our campus is not Wi-Fi-enabled. Hostels are better. There are insect problems during winter and rainy seasons. The food served in the mess is average. Our campus is well maintained. The laboratory is very good.

individual_reviews.course: B.E. in Mechanical Engineering - Batch of 2023
individual_reviews.title: Our college has value for money and the course is very good.

content.Placements: Almost 20% of students got placed in this course. The highest salary package offered was 4 LPA. The lowest salary package offered was 2 LPA. Internships are not offered at this college. Top roles are not offered in our course.
content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure is decent. The food quality is average. Facilities are not worth it. Hostels are better. The security facility is very good in our hostels. This college is very strict.
content.Faculty: Teachers are very friendly, helpful, and knowledgeable. We can develop more contacts and get knowledge about where we can go for the rest of our lives.

overview_faqs.question: Is Bajaj Institute of Technology, Wardha a known college/Institute?
overview_faqs.answer: Bajaj Institute of Technology, Wardha is a well-known institution for B.Tech courses. These programs are delivered by highly experienced faculty. As per Shiksha verified reviews, Bajaj Institute of Technology, Wardha has a rating of 4.1 on the basis of reviews by students. Not just this, it has also been rated 4.1 on campuslife, 4 on placements, 4.2 on faculty and 4.3 on Infrastructure.

review_summary.college_name: Bajaj Institute of Technology Wardha Reviews on Placements, Faculty & Facilities

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Computer Engineering - Batch of 2028
individual_reviews.title: Good college with supportive teachers and good facilities.

content.Placements: Placements are average but improving. The average student is placed by a computer because a lot of companies come from the tech industry. The highest package is, I think, 12 LPA. The lowest is 3 LPA. Most students are trained by the college. The teachers are selecting for the placement. But the placement is average, and it is improving.
content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure of the college is very good and very creative. When all things are maintained. Washrooms are very clean, and every day they are washed by the workers. The hostel is also very good. The area of the hostel is very good. I am also a hostel student.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Mechanical Engineering - Batch of 2025
individual_reviews.title: Well-equipped campus with good faculty and good placement support.

content.Placements: Bajaj Institute of Technology, Wardha has a placement rate of around 50–76%. The average package is 3–4.5 LPA, and the highest is up to 12–15 LPA. Top recruiters include TCS, Infosys, Capgemini, Wipro, and Bajaj Auto. Almost 100% of students receive internships.
content.Infrastructure: Bajaj Institute of Technology offers Wi-Fi-enabled classrooms, modern labs, and a digital library for students. Hostel rooms are clean with basic amenities. The mess food is hygienic but average. Basic medical facilities and various sports options are also available on campus.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Civil Engineering - Batch of 2028
individual_reviews.title: Bajaj College of Engineering is good if you are form local.

content.Placements: Placement percentage is pretty low but some companies offer 6 LPA. But the average package ranges from 3 LPA - 4 LPA for CS. Only IT companies do come for hiring and the rate of placement is very low. For other branches, it is very rare to get a job from college itself, you will have to find it yourself.
content.Infrastructure: You do get a Wi-Fi password which is okay. But there is some network problem in hostel VI and some sims that don't work at all. I am not a hosteler so I don't know too much about hostels. But I got to know the food quality could get better, it's not that good. The hostel rooms are pretty good and you do get a table, chair, and essentials. But water contains a lot of hardness in it.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Mechanical Engineering - Batch of 2027
individual_reviews.title: Good college with good environment and faculty.

content.Placements: We have strength of 63 students in our department. The average package of our college is 4.5 lakh and last year out of 63 students, 48 students were placed into companies. The college prepares us very well for placement. The training and placement department also brings good companies for placement. Since the college itself has its own company, that is a second good option.
content.Infrastructure: Infrastructure of college is good, with new and unique design. Also, college has good eco-friendly construction with healthy air. College also has well-equipped labs in each department, with lab technicians. Advanced labs are available and in good condition.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Computer Engineering - Batch of 2025
individual_reviews.title: BITI College: Satisfied with the college just because of the faculty’s good interaction.

content.Placements: Initially, the placements were good but after COVID there is a slight decrease. The average salary package offered is 4-6 Lacs/annum and the highest package is 20 Lacs/annum. There are lots of company visiting our college like TCS, Infosys, Wipro, Bajaj finance, etc.
content.Infrastructure: The college infrastructure is so good with all then classrooms containing ducts. The labs contain ACs and the hostel is also good with each room having 2 beds, 2 tables and 2 chairs. The first year is common for all the branches and after entering the second year, the subjects are distributed branch wise.

faqs.question: What can students do after JEE Main session 2 result?
faqs.answer: After JEE session 2 is completed, only those candidates who are aiming for IITs need to start preparing for JEE Advanced after clearing JEE Main. Those who are above the 98th percentile should start preparing for JEE Advanced as soon as possible. Those below this, between the 95th and 98th percentile, should focus on attempting more mock tests and previous year question papers so that they have a better chance of clearing JEE Advanced

reviews.review_heading: Good college with supportive teachers and good facilities.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of the college is very good and very creative. When all things are maintained. Washrooms are very clean, and every day they are washed by the workers. The hostel is also very good. The area of the hostel is very good. I am also a hostel student.

reviews.review_heading: Well-equipped campus with good faculty and good placement support.
reviews.review_text: Bajaj Institute of Technology offers Wi-Fi-enabled classrooms, modern labs, and a digital library for students. Hostel rooms are clean with basic amenities. The mess food is hygienic but average. Basic medical facilities and various sports options are also available on campus.

reviews.review_heading: Bajaj College of Engineering is good if you are form local.
reviews.review_text: You do get a Wi-Fi password which is okay. But there is some network problem in hostel VI and some sims that don't work at all. I am not a hosteler so I don't know too much about hostels. But I got to know the food quality could get better, it's not that good. The hostel rooms are pretty good and you do get a table, chair, and essentials. But water contains a lot of hardness in it.

reviews.review_heading: Good college with good environment and faculty.
reviews.review_text: Infrastructure of college is good, with new and unique design. Also, college has good eco-friendly construction with healthy air. College also has well-equipped labs in each department, with lab technicians. Advanced labs are available and in good condition.

reviews.review_heading: BITI College: Satisfied with  the college just because of the faculty’s good interaction.
reviews.review_text: The college infrastructure is so good with all then classrooms containing ducts. The labs contain ACs and the hostel is also good with each room having 2 beds, 2 tables and 2 chairs. The first year is common for all the branches and after entering the second year, the subjects are distributed branch wise.

reviews.review_heading: BIT: Leading the way in technological innovation.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of the college is very unique. It has many playgrounds. Laboratories and classrooms have ducts and smartboards. The hostel is very good, even though the mess is also good. The college conducts various activities, like Ambito (an annual gathering), every 2 years.

reviews.review_heading: I am satisfied with teachers.
reviews.review_text: All books are available in the library. Wi-Fi is available. The college canteen provides various types of snacks and cold drinks. Snacks are very delicious. The canteen facilities are affordable.

reviews.review_heading: Our college provides good placements.
reviews.review_text: Laboratories are available. Classrooms are very comfortable and have whiteboard. There is a library with several books. Hostel is average in our college and the new hostel is under construction. It is very good with all the facilities like Wi-Fi, gym and mess. Hostel rooms are good.

reviews.review_heading: Review of Bajaj Institute of Technology, Wardha.
reviews.review_text: The library is the best place on the entire campus because it has free Wi-Fi. All labs are the best because of the best lab teachers. The hostel is very affordable. The mess is very good. The hostel rooms are good. All classrooms are good.

reviews.review_heading: Our college provides good placements and facilities.
reviews.review_text: Our college provides excellent facilities and infrastructure. Wi-Fi is available throughout the campus. The quality of food in the mess and canteen is good. Tiffin facilities are available.

reviews.review_heading: It is better for those who do not have opportunity to study in high-tech colleges.
reviews.review_text: There are many labs like CP lab, EM mechanics lab, carpentry workshop, thermodynamics lab, pantry, electronics lab, basic electrical lab, basic mechanical lab, and so on. Many games and fun activities are conducted like volleyball, football, and so on.

reviews.review_heading: It is an excellent private college.
reviews.review_text: We have well-ventilated classrooms. Each one is facilitated with cooler ducting. Internet in each classroom, spacious corridors, and posh toilets are just a glimpse of the beauty of this college. The nature scene in the mechanical department is a specialty. The dedicated hostel for this college is still under construction and is expected to be finished by 2025, but students who are not from the same native town live in Shiksha Mandal, which also owns BIT and has all facilities.

reviews.review_heading: Our college has the best infrastructure in Maharashtra.
reviews.review_text: Classrooms are air-conditioned and Wi-Fi enabled. The infrastructure of our college is very good. Hostel is under construction. Our campus is surrounded by mountains, valleys, plains, farms, and a nearby village. Our campus has a beautiful nature that makes it soothing and perfect for students to study.

reviews.review_heading: It is a good college with very good infrastructure.
reviews.review_text: Hostel was average in our college but the new hostel was under construction.  It was very good with all the facilities like Wi-Fi, gym, and mess. Its fee was Rs.12,000 per annum. Mess fee was Rs.2,500 per month. The quality of food served was good.

reviews.review_heading: I am satisfied with this college.
reviews.review_text: Laboratories are available. Classrooms are very comfortable, and whiteboards are available. It has a library with several books. The hostel rooms are good.

highlights.summary:
The JEE Main 2026 registration for session 2 has closed for Mahatma Gandhi Chitrakoot Gramodaya Vishwavidyalaya - MGCGV admission to BTech, BArch and BPlan courses. The session 2 exams will be conducted from Apr 2 to Apr 9, 2026.

A few more updates are given below:

placements.overview: Established in 1993, Mahatma Gandhi Chitrakoot Gramodaya Vishwavidyalaya - MGCGV is located in Madhya Pradesh. The institute offers courses like B.E. / B.Tech, MBA/PGDM, B.Sc., M.Sc. and BCA. These courses are offered in Full Time mode. A total of 72 courses offered by the Institute are available across streams such as Engineering, Business & Management Studies, IT & Software, Accounting & Commerce, Arts ( Fine / Visual / Performing ) and Mass Communication & Media. The institute has all the necessary facilities to the students.

reviews_list.batch_info: Bachelor of Commerce (B.Com.) - Batch of 2024
reviews_list.review_title: Review of Mahatma Gandhi Chitrakoot Gramodaya Vishwavidyalaya - MGCGV.

review_content.Placements: Here at my university, I am offered many types of courses. But at the time of placement, it was not held in my college because my university is situated in a rural area in Chitrakoot. 60 percent of students got internships.
review_content.Infrastructure: My university infrastructure is very awesome; here is a big playground for playing cricket, football and many other games. There are very big libraries at my university. And the infrastructure—ISC-shaped buildings, many labs around here and medical facilities—are also provided by our university.

reviews_list.batch_info: B.Tech. in Food Technology - Batch of 2019
reviews_list.review_title: This college provides good infrastructure, but placements are not fine.

review_content.Placements: There was no fixed schedule for the placements. The companies visit our campus to hire students. Internships will be provided to some students not based on the percentage, but it was only luck otherwise they had to search by themselves.
review_content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure was good, but the hostel was not available on campus. The students had to take the room or hostel outside the campus. There was one canteen on campus, and the price for food was good. Some sports were also available. The students will get ayurvedic medicines.

reviews_list.batch_info: Bachelor of Commerce (B.Com.) - Batch of 2021
reviews_list.review_title: Mahatma Gandhi Chitrakoot Gramodaya Vishwavidyalaya is a village level university.

review_content.Placements: There are very few placements in this college. And the placements that happen would have been above 85%. A package of 1.5 to 2 Lacs is available in the placement of this college. In this college of ours, all the information about the entrepreneurial world is made available to the students while providing education for entrepreneurship development.
review_content.Infrastructure: Library Wi-Fi & Computer Classes Available Here. The boys hostel was closed and girls hostel maybe reopen after a long time due to the spread of covid- 19. Canteen facility is available in this college which provides good food. Sports in this college is of high standard. Every year on the occasion of Foundation Day, from 8 to 12 February, games are played in this college of ours and distribute trophy.

reviews_list.batch_info: B.Sc. in Maths - Batch of 2020
reviews_list.review_title: Not much satisfied because of lack of placements.

review_content.Placements: Generally this college doesn't give any placements opportunity for B.Sc. mathematics. It's just a base for future availability of various examinations. Students generally go for post graduation for better placements. And job opportunities .
review_content.Infrastructure: Good availability of infrastructure like laboratories like physics, chemistry, biology etc., library. Good condition of classroom better quality of furniture. Medical and academic services also provided by the campus. Food is also good.

reviews_list.batch_info: B.Tech. in Agricultural Engineering - Batch of 2022
reviews_list.review_title: Studies are good, and the campus is lush green and good, but the placements are not available.

review_content.Placements: I am a student of B.Tech agricultural engineering, 3rd year. In the final year, the university sends all students for training in places like Budhni Hisar Assam, etc., in tractor company for 60 days. No other companies come to our campus. Other courses are available in our university, like food engineering.
review_content.Infrastructure: The facilities in our university are average, and the classrooms are spacious and have good ventilation. The labs are well maintained. Wi-Fi is available for every student for study purpose. The hostel is available for girls but not for boys. Safety is the best in girls hostel, and food in the canteen is good sometimes.

reviews_list.batch_info: B.Sc. in Maths - Batch of 2017
reviews_list.review_title: I am absolutely satisfied with good teachers and really good infrastructure and facilities.

review_content.Placements: About 60% of the students were placed from our college. In our course, salary packages are not offered. There are no placements in our course. However, about 80% of the students got internships from our course because it is B.Sc in mathematics course.
review_content.Infrastructure: Wi-Fi and labs are available in our college. Classrooms are very fine and have smart class facilities for faculty members to teach. The library is very good, and every book is available in our library. The canteen is good but not very good. Sports and games are available, and medical facilities are very nice.

review_summary.college_name: Mahatma Gandhi Chitrakoot Gramodaya Vishwavidyalaya - MGCGV Reviews on Placements, Faculty & Facilities

individual_reviews.course: Bachelor of Commerce (B.Com.) - Batch of 2024
individual_reviews.title: Review of Mahatma Gandhi Chitrakoot Gramodaya Vishwavidyalaya - MGCGV.

content.Placements: Here at my university, I am offered many types of courses. But at the time of placement, it was not held in my college because my university is situated in a rural area in Chitrakoot. 60 percent of students got internships.
content.Infrastructure: My university infrastructure is very awesome; here is a big playground for playing cricket, football and many other games. There are very big libraries at my university. And the infrastructure—ISC-shaped buildings, many labs around here and medical facilities—are also provided by our university.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Food Technology - Batch of 2019
individual_reviews.title: This college provides good infrastructure, but placements are not fine.

content.Placements: There was no fixed schedule for the placements. The companies visit our campus to hire students. Internships will be provided to some students not based on the percentage, but it was only luck otherwise they had to search by themselves.
content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure was good, but the hostel was not available on campus. The students had to take the room or hostel outside the campus. There was one canteen on campus, and the price for food was good. Some sports were also available. The students will get ayurvedic medicines.

individual_reviews.course: Bachelor of Commerce (B.Com.) - Batch of 2021
individual_reviews.title: Mahatma Gandhi Chitrakoot Gramodaya Vishwavidyalaya is a village level university.

content.Placements: There are very few placements in this college. And the placements that happen would have been above 85%. A package of 1.5 to 2 Lacs is available in the placement of this college. In this college of ours, all the information about the entrepreneurial world is made available to the students while providing education for entrepreneurship development.
content.Infrastructure: Library Wi-Fi & Computer Classes Available Here. The boys hostel was closed and girls hostel maybe reopen after a long time due to the spread of covid- 19. Canteen facility is available in this college which provides good food. Sports in this college is of high standard. Every year on the occasion of Foundation Day, from 8 to 12 February, games are played in this college of ours and distribute trophy.

individual_reviews.course: B.Sc. in Maths - Batch of 2020
individual_reviews.title: Not much satisfied because of lack of placements.

content.Placements: Generally this college doesn't give any placements opportunity for B.Sc. mathematics. It's just a base for future availability of various examinations. Students generally go for post graduation for better placements. And job opportunities .
content.Infrastructure: Good availability of infrastructure like laboratories like physics, chemistry, biology etc., library. Good condition of classroom better quality of furniture. Medical and academic services also provided by the campus. Food is also good.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Agricultural Engineering - Batch of 2022
individual_reviews.title: Studies are good, and the campus is lush green and good, but the placements are not available.

content.Placements: I am a student of B.Tech agricultural engineering, 3rd year. In the final year, the university sends all students for training in places like Budhni Hisar Assam, etc., in tractor company for 60 days. No other companies come to our campus. Other courses are available in our university, like food engineering.
content.Infrastructure: The facilities in our university are average, and the classrooms are spacious and have good ventilation. The labs are well maintained. Wi-Fi is available for every student for study purpose. The hostel is available for girls but not for boys. Safety is the best in girls hostel, and food in the canteen is good sometimes.

admission_process.title: Mahatma Gandhi Chitrakoot Gramodaya Vishwavidyalaya - MGCGV Admission Process 2025

paragraphs: Mahatma Gandhi Chitrakoot Gramodaya Vishwavidyalaya - MGCGV admissionis through qualifying exam scores of the candidates. The institute offers courses at UG, PG, Advanced Masters and Doctorate levels in streams includingEngineering, Business and Management Studies, IT and Software, Accounting and Commerce, Arts ( Fine / Visual / Performing ), Mass Communication and Media, Humanities and Social Sciences, Hospitality and Travel, Science and Teaching and Education.Mahatma Gandhi Chitrakoot Gramodaya Vishwavidyalaya - MGCGVadmission is granted based on performance of the aspirants in exams, such asJEE Main, CMAT, and ICAR AIEEA. Candidates must register online on the institute’s website. For the offline availability of the application form, students must check with the college admission department.

Candidates have to pay a total tuition fee ofINR 19,320 - 2,04,820for UG, PG, Advanced Masters and Doctorate level. Besides tuition fee, students also need to pay caution deposit, exam fee, hostel fee, etc.
Typically, the duration of the UG level courses ranges between 3 years - 4 years.

reviews.review_text: My university infrastructure is very awesome; here is a big playground for playing cricket, football and many other games. There are very big libraries at my university. And the infrastructure—ISC-shaped buildings, many labs around here and medical facilities—are also provided by our university.

reviews.review_heading: This college provides good infrastructure, but placements are not fine.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure was good, but the hostel was not available on campus. The students had to take the room or hostel outside the campus. There was one canteen on campus, and the price for food was good. Some sports were also available. The students will get ayurvedic medicines.

reviews.review_heading: Mahatma Gandhi Chitrakoot Gramodaya Vishwavidyalaya is a village level university.
reviews.review_text: Library Wi-Fi & Computer Classes Available Here. The boys hostel was closed and girls hostel maybe reopen after a long time due to the spread of covid- 19. Canteen facility is available in this college which provides good food. Sports in this college is of high standard. Every year on the occasion of Foundation Day, from 8 to 12 February, games are played in this college of ours and distribute trophy.

reviews.review_heading: Not much satisfied because of lack of placements.
reviews.review_text: Good availability of infrastructure like laboratories like physics, chemistry, biology etc., library. Good condition of classroom better quality of furniture. Medical and academic services also provided by the campus. Food is also good.

reviews.review_heading: Studies are good, and the campus is lush green and good, but the placements are not available.
reviews.review_text: The facilities in our university are average, and the classrooms are spacious and have good ventilation. The labs are well maintained. Wi-Fi is available for every student for study purpose. The hostel is available for girls but not for boys. Safety is the best in girls hostel, and food in the canteen is good sometimes.

reviews.review_heading: I am absolutely satisfied with good teachers and really good infrastructure and facilities.
reviews.review_text: Wi-Fi and labs are available in our college. Classrooms are very fine and have smart class facilities for faculty members to teach. The library is very good, and every book is available in our library. The canteen is good but not very good. Sports and games are available, and medical facilities are very nice.

reviews.review_heading: Our college needs improvement in the infrastructure of the institution.
reviews.review_text: Our college doesn't provide any hostel facility for boys.. No department library is there in the institution, and they don't provide Wi-Fi. Only Central library situated in the main building of university with very limited books of all departments. No facility is available for the computer lab. Canteen, medical facilities, sports and games also need improvement in terms of facilities and infrastructure.

reviews.review_heading: If you are a poor student and you want to study in a government college on scholarship, join here.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of our college is beautiful. The infrastructure very attractive, and there is a garden available here. Classrooms, smart classes and labs are very old, and they constructed some new labs last year. The college also has a central library, but it doesn't have any interesting books. Medical facilities provided in this college are good, and the college also has a good gym. Sports and games facilities available if you are interested to take part.

reviews.review_heading: It is not good to pursue B.Tech food technology here as there are no proper faculty and labs.
reviews.review_text: There is a Wi-Fi facility with a speed, i.e., lower than that of 2G. There are several Wi-Fi networks here, but they are not accessible to students. Even some faculty members change the password of student Wi-Fi so that students can't use it. If they see that you are using the Wi-Fi in the corridor, they will shout on you and even humiliate you that why are you using Wi-Fi, just get lost from there. Labs are just too old they are not updated even some equipment doesn't work at all. Even lab atte...

reviews.review_heading: A review of Mahatma Gandhi Chitrakoot Gramodaya Vishwavidyalaya (MGCGV).
reviews.review_text: Our college is almost 30 years old, but the campus is still luxurious and has modern-day facilities like spacious classrooms, Wi-Fi all over the campus, and many other required facilities.

reviews.review_heading: Review of Mahatma Gandhi Chitrakoot University.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of the college is damn good except for the labs which are quite outdated. There are Wi-Fi labs and good classrooms. There are no proper sports and games facilities. The food in the canteen is average. Hostel rooms are as pathetic as it can be. I haven't faced any issues regarding the infrastructure during my tenure.

reviews.review_heading: Review of MGCGV University in Chitrakoot.
reviews.review_text: Infrastructure of the university is very good. But labs are not in good situation. There are very old instruments in the laboratory of the college. Classrooms are of good quality. Library facility should be open for more time to the students. Departmental canteens should also be open. Hostel rooms are not so good. Wi-Fi is not working sometimes. Internet connections should be given separately of very high-speed to the Master's Students and Research Scholars (Ph.D. ) There is lack of sports groun...

reviews.review_heading: Faculty, facilities and infrastructure are very good according to fund imbursement.
reviews.review_text: Infrastructure is good, available all facilities. It has Wi-Fi, labs, classrooms, a central library, medical facilities, sports and games etc. All facilities are available here except campus placement. Good quality of food is available in the canteen for students.

reviews.review_heading: It is a waste of time and money. Please, if you want to save your life, don't join that college.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure is okay, but not of IIT standard. Labs in our college are just for namesake. We have separate buildings for different courses. But, the condition is quite disgraceful. It needs some care, especially the washrooms, they are in the worse condition.

reviews.review_heading: My college is the best college compared to all other states. Good placement, good infrastructure.
reviews.review_text: There is Wi-Fi facility. There is the best lab central library. All personal facilities are there. The best quality of food is available in the canteen 24*7. Four hostels are there. I don't have any issue during the tenure at the college. There are separate faculty and department in the university. All the government teachers honestly teach us.
